* '''Strengths:''' kills single ants faster, won't die to easily,
* '''Weaknesses:''' crowded ants, U+ ants 
* '''Tip:''' I reccomend using an U clover instead of an M clover. if you see an hornet, run.
* '''Author:''' GHY8208
{{Builds2}}
[[Category:Builds]]

title: Builds - Desert
content: {{Builds - Desert|Desert}}{{Background|图片=Desertb.png|大小=2000px}} __TOC__[[Category:Builds]] == Builds == === Standard Desert Farmer === ''"Booooring..."'' * '''Petals Used:''' Web x2 (M+), Pincer x2 (L+), Lotus (M+), Starfish/Yucca 2x (L+), Any dps petal [Preferably M+ Lightning; lightning required for sewers] 3x * '''How it works:''' I assume you are mainly holding attack; therefore, webs cannot spawn close range to you, so webs slow down beetles from afar, and pincer slows them down if they slip through. The rarity of your lotus pretty much negates the poison damage from scorpions (which is like 85% of their damage). Healing petals are for healing (🤯), and damage petals are for damage (🤯🤯🤯) * '''Strengths:''' Beetles, Scorpions, Fire Ants (if you are using dps lightning), also is really good in sewers (lightning is guaranteed to hit flies, spiders and roaches get slowed, lotus also mitigates spider damage in case you hit one) * '''Weaknesses:''' If you are surrounded, accidentally hit a sandstorm 5 times, or scorpions above your lotus rarity spawn in. * '''Variants:''' You can replace all of the healing petals +1 damage petal with leaf (mid damage / mid healing). You can also consider third eye, so you don't have to move back every time a beetle is traveling at like 1 mph. Antennae is decent for sewers. * '''Tips:''' THIS BUILD IS VERY FLEXIBLE. The rarities given on the "petals used" sections is to be able to farm Mythics. However, if you do not have all the rarities, it still works with legendaries (which can still kill MBeetle). ===BEETLE ELIMINATOR=== :''"I'm a pest eliminator for beetles"'' *'''Petals Used:''' (ALL L+) Ant egg,wing,faster,leaf,bone,Ant egg, bur, leaf, web *'''How it Works:''' Ants and web slow it down, faster and web for more dps and wing for range *'''Strengths:''' beetles and spiders *'''Weaknesses:''' shooting mobs *'''Variations:''' you can change the web for another bone *'''Author:''' Antarctica ===Medic=== '''''"I wanna be a doctor!"''''' *'''Petals Used:''' Many teammates with yggdrasil, Yggdrasil, healing petals, Mythic+ Missile, and dps petals. *'''How it Works:''' You heal a bunch of people and they fight with you so scorpions are dead *'''Strengths:''' EVERYTHING! * '''Weaknesses:''' if all ygg people die everyone's dead *'''Variations:''' Mythic+ Shovel *'''Tip:''' Use Mythic Yggdrasil *'''Author:''' no one === '''The Bane of (fire) Ants''' === '''''"Poggers build hehe"''''' * How it works is that you use a '''cutter''' of any rarity to ram mobs, '''two Cacti,''' '''two Fangs''' make sure you don't place them together''', one salt, two yuccas or starfish,''' '''one sponge, one basil(if you don't have use root).''' * Strengths: you have great survivability and can grind through antholes. * Weakness: easily overwhelmed by mobs piling when they chase after you(basically a ton of mobs). === '''The Living Cactus (with Leaves)''' === '''''"The perfect Rammer Build, if used correctly..."''''' * '''Petals Used:''' 2x L+ Soil/5x L+ Yucca or Starfish/L+ Cutter/1x R+ Salt/1x L+ Sponge * '''Strategy:''' Switch to a defensive position and advance toward the nearest mob...AND RAM INTO IT! The mob will take the amount of damage your body does + the percentage of the mobs' damage that is reflected with the salt, usually guaranteeing their death * '''Strengths:''' makes you a GREAT defense unit for your team, and allows you to tank mobs repeatedly without any help * '''Weaknesses:''' Base Speed is decreased and size is increased; this makes escaping from mobs a LOT more difficult. additionally, it may not do too well against Legendary and Mythic mobs UNLESS you are working with a teammate * '''Alternatives:''' # Roses, Dahlias and Fangs can also be alternatives. However, they are not consistent and not good for a ramming build. # instead of using a Cutter, you can use a talisman to evade damage. #Otherwise, use a Basil to increase the healing power of your Leaves, but remember that the Basil isn't all that effective! # You can use Cactuses instead of Soil (that is, assuming you have a Cactus that is a higher rarity than the Soil you are using), since it retains your movement speed * '''Tip:''' this build can also be used in Garden, since the Salt can easily take out Hornets * '''Author:''' FoldingPapers ==="'''Don't Touch Me'''"=== '''''"Untouchable baby"''''' *'''Petals Used:''' In this specific order: (magnet/yucca/leaf), Lightning, (yucca/leaf), Jelly, (yucca/leaf), Lightning, (yucca/leaf), Jelly,(yucca/leaf),lightning *'''How it Works:''' Yucca/Leaf for healing, Jelly to keep scorpions away, Lightning to kill. After jelly bounces, step up and lightning. Repeat with other lighting/jelly. Stay in defensive form unless you want to attack mobs. *'''Strengths:''' Scorpions, Beetles, Small swarms. Works best in lower level waves, falls off hard once you hit around wave 25. *'''Weaknesses:''' Too many Mobs, surrounded from all sides with mobs, DPS isn't very high. Any wave with mythics. *'''Variations:''' Replace Jellies for Lightnings when most scorpions and beetles are killed. * '''Tip:''' Try to use at least rare+ lightnings and jellies. At least rare+ yuccas/leafs/starfishes. Yuccas work best. ( *'''Author:''' wiem#2692 === '''"The Great Rice Wall"''' === '''''"You shall not pass..."''''' *'''Petals Used:''' Yin Yang/E+ Pollen/Rice/Rice/Rice/E+ Pollen/(Dahlia,Leaf,Rose)/(Dahlia,Leaf,Rose). Secondary slot: In first slot, any petal of choice (ex. magnet, cutter, leaf, salt, not yin yang), rest does not matter (your choice) *'''How it Works:''' Toggle pressing 1 (or whichever slot you have the yin yang in) to switch the rotation of your petals . Use this to control you petals so that the rice wall (pushed together by the pollens) is always facing your target. It helps to do some maneuvering so that the mobs are coming at you from one side only. For the majority of the time, stay in the attack mode, except when you are caught off guard by a mob approaching your undefended side, in which case the defensive mode can help the rice wall counter-attack quicker and minimize damage. When your Rice are in contact with mobs, this loadout is capable of very '''HIGH damage.''' *'''Strengths:''' WALLS OF MOBS chasing you around the edge, legendary mobs (esp. with team) *'''Weaknesses:''' Surrounded/crushed by mobs, being blocked off by desert centipede/cactus while having mobs chase you *'''Variations:''' Can try different healing petals, swapping pollen with E+ lights, and different number of rice depending on your needs * '''Tip:''' Be careful with your sides that are unguarded by the rices. They can be exposed to attacks. Thus, it is wise to stay near the edges of the map if solo or always having an escape plan in the case of a swarm approaching from many sides. Also, keep in mind that whichever petal you are swapping with yin yang will be switching out quickly and either not spawn or spawn for a short time, so choose a petal that makes sense (can be improved by Quick Hands Skill). *'''Author:''' F1R3_H4X [[File:Screenshot 2022-12-18 8.07.35 PM.png|thumb|422x422px|Example of build]] ==='''"intermediate dessert"'''=== '''''"for the people who are not new and not old"''''' (NOTE: ANY RARITY WORKS HIGHER RARITY HIGHER WAVER) (NOTE 2: LOW RARITY USERS CAN REPLACE POLLEN FOR ANY PETAL) *'''Petals Used:''' web(2x), pollen, web, pollen, web, pollen, web(2x) *'''How it Works:''' you simply hold click or right click (choice of player) *'''Strengths:''' Can destroy beetle and scorpions *'''Weaknesses:''' if the beetles and scorpions get past the webs and you try to run you are probably going to run into a sandstorm *'''Variations:''' replace egg with stick if you're lucky * '''Tip:''' try to team up with a full pollen or full egg *'''Author:''' [https://official-florrio.fandom.com/wiki/User:Your_average_io_gamer Your average io gamer] ===Heavy Guy=== '''''"Booster in florr.io??"''''' [[File:Heavy guy example.png|alt=Example of the Build|thumb|415x415px|Example of the build]] *'''Petals Used:''' Full heavy *'''How it Works:''' you knockback very much and have a super strong anti ram shield. *'''Strengths:''' Strong Ram Mobs *'''Weaknesses:''' Projectile Mobs *'''Variations:''' Replace heavies with corns or rocks or jellies *'''Tip:''' Don't go ramming with these against projectile mobs or strong ram mobs if you miss one petal * '''Author:''' Enzogta === Anti-Australia === '''''"Five-star exterminator"''''' *'''Petals Used:''' Pincer/(Magnet, Stinger)/Leaf/Stinger/Web/Heavy/Leaf/Claw/Leaf/(Corn, Heavy)/(Leaf, Faster) *'''How it Works:''' Pincer and Web slows down, Stingers and Claws go ouch, Leaf for healing when poisoned, Heavy and Corn yeet bad guys away. And Magnet for stealing kills as a decoration *'''Strengths:''' A few big scorpions and beetles *'''Weaknesses:''' Lots of big scorpions and beetles *'''Variations:''' Leaves can be swapped out for roses and more dps like Light * '''Tip:''' Don't yeet big scorpions and beetles at yourself, aka don't hold click all the time ===The big survivor=== '''''"Ayo its that big kid, can't even go close to him..."''''' *'''Petals Used:''' cactus/pincer/(jelly/shell[depends if you want health or knockback])/pincer/soil/pincer/leaf/pincer/leaf/pincer *'''How it Works:''' the cactus gives you health(you really need), pincer does damage and keeps mobs away. Jelly, the reason it was made... or shell, if you are good, to give shield. Soil, more health lol. leaves to heal. *'''Strengths:''' Avoiding every mob(except sandstorm) *'''Weaknesses:''' when you are being chased and run into sandstorm *'''Variations:''' In your bottom bar use (everything has to be legendary or higher or would not work good) light/pincer/light/faster/faster/powder/light/stinger/faster/light *'''Tip:''' Use this build, you get VERY far * '''Author:''' the build builder ===The Ant Grinder=== '''''"Oh look a mythic fire ant! Not anymore!"''''' *'''Petals Used:''' leg+ antennae, leg+ faster, leg+ faster, mythic+ stinger, mythic+ stinger, mythic+ stinger, leg+ heavy, leg+ pincer, leg+ iris, and epic+ magnet *'''How it Works:''' The antennae lets you see mythic fire ants so you can kill them, the fasters for dps, the stingers for high damage, the heavy for knockback (jelly can also knockback, but it's too much knockback and someone could steal you kill), the pincer to slow the mythics and ultras down, the iris to poison the mobs (you have to deal at least 5% of the damage to the mob to get it's drops, so the iris will gradually do damage over time to one mob so you can kill other ones), and a magnet to collect loot. *'''Strengths:''' Killing multiple high tier fire ant mobs at a time *'''Weaknesses:''' '''NONE.''' *'''Variations:''' In the bottom bar, do leg+ faster, yggdrasil, mythic+ rose, mythic+ sand, mythic+ sand, mythic+ sand, mythic+ web, mythic+ web, mythic+ rose, and leg+ clover. The fasters and sands is for dps, the web is for slowing mobs down, the rose is for healing, the clover is for getting better rarity mobs, and the yggdrasil is to revive '''greedy beggars noobs who have a skill issue.''' *'''Tips:''' If you don't have a yggdrasil, replace it with a powder (to outrun mobs), a web (to slow mobs), or a leaf/rose (healing). *'''Author:''' [[User:Bobz99|Bobz99]] === '''Senic''' === '''"Your too slow"''' '''Petals used:''' Bubble , bubble , powder , bubble, bubble(make sure that your bubble are all same rarity.), light, light, rose, light, light. '''How it works:''' The light is for protect and to close in the space so you can boost faster with only one shift. Bubble to move faster and powder does not stack so use only one. '''Strengths:''' '''FAST'''. '''Weakness:''' Not enough offensive petal so good luck dealing with the leg and above '''Variations:''' Use pollen to replace light. '''Tip:''' Be carful where you ram. You will go very far if you are careful, keep a secondary build for offensive. '''Author:''' Senic the hedgehog.(no copyright(pls don't sue me)) === KnockBack === '''''"Knockback"''''' |-| Petals used= '''Jelly, Pincher, Jelly, Pincher, Stinger, Web, Bubble, Bubble''' |-| How it Works= '''The stinger harms them, the webs slow them down, the pincher also slows them down, the jelly blasts them away, and the bubbles are used to escape''' |-| Strengths= The monsters will probably get lost and go for someone else. |-| Weakness= Hornets can blast though most things, it also doesn't work on crowds |-| Variations= Replace the stingers with more pinchers and stingers, or replace 1 with a ygg to revive puny spamming noobs. Author: [[User:Seal-of-approval-2000|Seal-of-approval-2000]] ===Killer Machine=== '''''"Survivor"''''' *'''Petals Used: Stinger (Epic+), Pincer (Legendary+), Corn (Epic+), Pincer (Legendary+), Stinger (Epic+), Egg (Legendary+), Corn (Epic+), Pincer (Legendary+)''' Keep Roses(Rare+), Clams(Rare+) and a Antennae in inventory(required) *'''How it Works:''' Use the antennae to see other mobs. Then use Clam to get Shield up. Go in for the kill and switch the antennae out. The corn will push the mob away if it gets too close. You can use fasters. The stingers do so much damage and the pincers will poison them. Make sure to keep a distance. Shield can only do so much. Use roses to manually heal. *'''Strengths:''' Close range *'''Weaknesses:''' Scorpions that keep on firing missiles.[[File:Killer Machine.png|border|right|frameless|472x472px|Killer Machine Inventory]]'''Variations:''' MAKE YOUR OWN!! This is your inventory, you can make it to suit whatever zone your in. * '''Author:''' Gamer Ray * ==='''Bane of the beetles'''=== '''''"It's hungry and beetles are its favourite meal."''''' *'''Petals Used:''' (leg+) bone/bone/wing/wing/bone/bone/pincer/web/leaf/magnet *'''How it Works:''' bones give short range damage, wings give long range damage, pincer and web slows down, leaf heals, magnet collects drops. *'''Strengths:''' beetles, shinies, fire ants(maybe), desert centipedes(maybe) * '''Weaknesses:''' scorpions, sandstorms(maybe) *'''Variations:''' replace bone with other high damage-dealing petals such as stinger or claw or others; replace wing with missile or egg(s), replace pincer/web with knockback(jelly, corn, heavy) or powder; put in plank maybe to defend against scorpions; put in antennae to see dangers *'''Tip:''' Hit beetles with pincer first to decrease their speed and run around it; if there are many beetles this still works as one slowed beetle slows the others. If you find that pincer can't quite cope, find a cactus or a desert centipede and hide behind it... just make sure that the beetles can't touch you, they're very high damage mobs. Also try to evade scorpions or sandstorms while running to keep away from danger. ==='''Flying Missiles'''=== '''''"Every wall can break. "''''' *'''Petals Used:''' L+bubble/L+bubble/M+light/faster(rarity based on your reload speed)/R+magnet/L+antennae/M+missile/M+missile/M+missile/M+missile *'''How it Works:''' Use bubbles often, with or without a large group of mobs. It can get you out of danger(or find mobs quickly), that's something 100% true. The reason that missiles must be M+ is that you need self-adjusting and high-damaging weapons to deal enough damage to get the drops. It's basically a combination of instant traveling and far-distance shooting. *'''Strengths:''' Able to travel quickly, good at getting drops. (Believe me, I calculated that one) * '''Weaknesses:''' There's no healing petals, so it requires a good skill set. Especially weak against scorpions, because you'll be dead when it hit you. *'''Variations:''' The chance of being trapped in a group of mobs is small, so you can consider replacing the faster petal with a web or a pincer, for emergency use. *'''Tip:''' Try to heal yourself before going into the final section of the desert. *'''Author:''' (no account) ==='''The Beetle Busters'''=== '''''"They wanna bite you, but you won't let them."''''' *'''Petals (Noob):''' Antennae/Faster/Powder or Web/Rose/Orange/Lotus/Faster/Jelly/Magnet/Orange '''(Recommended Legendary+)'''[[File:Noob beetle busters build.png|thumb|298x298px|Leg+ Noob beetle busters build]] *'''Petals (Pro):''' Antennae alts Third Eye/Faster/Pincer/Any healing petal except Yucca/Stinger/Lotus or any damage petals/Faster/Any damage petals/Magnet/Stinger '''(Required to be Mythic+ except magnet)''' [[File:Pro beetle busters build.png|thumb|297x297px|Mythic+ Pro beetle busters build]] *'''How it Works:''' Fasters make you be able to deal damage quicker and rotates to a safety petal (like pincer and jelly that slows down a beetle) quicker, antennae makes you see further since beetles have huge aggro ranges, powder speeds you up, pincer/web slow the beetles down, healing petals -- you need them, lotus is useful when an M scorpion is after you (absorbs damage of its poisonous pincers), stinger/oranges are the main sources of damage, magnet makes you pick up drops that are further away from you, jelly either bounces away a scorpion pincer or bounces off a beetle for a short period of time, third eyes are not required but they help you stretch your petals further out, especially helpful when you have stingers (because oranges are just a lazy noob alternative for stingers) *'''Strengths:''' kills beetles effectively, heals you, makes you be able to solo an army of M beetles sometimes, good enough to deal with any types of mobs that can potentially spawn in Desert 5. * '''Weaknesses:''' not good enough for ultra beetle tho (:Facepalm:) *'''Tip:''' Stay away from ultra beetle or don't be the person who aggros it first (:HyperFacepalm:) *'''Author:''' ''Paindemic'' ==='''No more cacti please.'''=== '''''“ow spiky"''''' *'''Petals Used:''' 2x L+ Rice/L+ Bur/2x L+ Rice/3x L+ Light/whatever/whatever *'''Secondary:''' 4x L+ Light/4x L+ Bubble/1x Yin Yang/ 1x M+ Antennae *'''How it Works:''' The rice petals deal tons of damage every second to the cacti, the Bur allows them to do even more damage, the lights clump the petals closer together, and the Yin Yang is for the Rice to stay in the same spot, leading to even more damage. *'''Strengths:''' Cacti, and swarms of lower rarity mobs. * '''Weaknesses:''' Swarms of very high rarity mobs and trolls. *'''Variations:''' add another rice in the place of a light! or add a lightning in the place of a rice if you get swarmed by mobs! *'''Tip:''' Use this build for Mythic+ Cacti especially. *'''Author: @Justin1209 (a guest in florr.io)''' === '''No more Beetles''' === '''''“Bane of Beetles v2"''''' *'''Petals Used:''' Pincer, light, faster, light, pincer, faster, jelly, magnet, leaf *'''Secondary:''' Anything you want, put light and faster under magnet and leaf for more dps *'''How it Works:''' Pincers slow beetles down, lights and fasters do dps, and jelly helps keeping beetles away *'''Strengths:''' beetles following you, including ultra beetles (it could kill a ubeetle relatively fast with mlights and lpincers) * '''Weaknesses:''' stuff in front of you with a high rarity beetle behind you, and scorpions: stuff in front of you can push you into the high rarity beetle and kill you, and scorpions are just annoying. *'''Variations:''' maybe replace a light with a lightning, or use rubbers (not tested) *'''Tip:''' try not to have a L or M scorpion seeing you, if it does, you're dead unless you have something that can kill it quickly. Also, it's basically a modified deathwheel so it works against cacti as well. === Ultimate Desert Build === '''''"(Enter Slogan Here)"''''' * Primary Build: M+ Pincer, U+ Leaf, U+ Rock, M+ Iris, U+ Rock, U+ Leaf, M+ Cactus or M+ Powder, M+ Pincer, M+ Antennae, L+ Magnet * Secondary Build: 5 bubbles, 2 M+ Lights, M+ Cactuses for the other 3 petal slots * How it works: Pincers slow down Beetles, Rock does good damage, Leaf for heals and damage, Antennae and Magnet are self explanatory, Cactus for if you get hit by Ultra Beetle and Powder for outrunning Beetles if needed, and Iris for poison damage. * Strengths: Beetles Scorpions and Cactus * Weaknesses: Hordes of mobs and Mythic Sandstorms as they have good body damage * Variations: Add Third eye instead of Antennae or Magnet. Use Wings instead of Rocks and Iris for Sandstorms as they need to be dealt with from a distance. Use Lightning instead of Rocks or Iris to deal With Hordes. * Tips: If you don't have a M+ Iris use a faster to increase rotation speed. * Author: Florr.io Nerd === "Desert-Centi Troller and More" === "Player goes BRRRR And Centi goes WEEEEEE" *'''Petals Used:''' Requires: 2x L+ Heavy,2x M+ Jelly, 2x M+ Bubbles, 1 M+ Antennae, 2x Leaf ( Rose,Yucca,fangs,Shells) and 1 M+ Powder *'''How it Works:''' You can troll any Types of Mobs in Desert, except for Beetles and cactus, M powder lets u escape when You are attacked,You can Also Use Rock or Corn to replace Heavy or Jelly. Plus,You need to get your health bar be filled with shells so if you were attacked, you can survive. *'''Strengths:''' Centi,And more * '''Weaknesses:''' Beetles and Cactuses, Scorpions,(Maybe),Sandstorms(Maybe) *'''Variations:''' U can change M powder to faster to increase your petal rotation *'''Tip: It's best to troll when You have a friend or a player with you,U can troll anyone with you except for Beetles and Cactuses''' *Additional Information: You can also use the troll method in Fire ant hell and other ant hell with improved U+ Petals, becareful also when you troll because u can risk your self too. *Secondary Build: Use 4x Leaf or more healing petals (Shell will be the best) , Use 1 M+ basil, 3x M+ Bubbles, 1 L+ antennae and 1 L+ Shovel so you can escape when hordes attack you. *'''Author: Sparkie_Playzz A.K.A (Sparky)''' === Beetle X Rubber === '''''"Catch me if you can Beetles!"''''' *'''Petals Used:''' Requires: 8x L+ Rubber, 1+M Antennae and 1 L type of any healing petal ( shell too ) *'''How it Works:''' Rubber lets you escape because you get knockback recieved from the beetles, antennae lets you see and Helaing petal will heal you!... *'''Strengths: Anything, Scorpions ( I think)?''' * '''Weaknesses:''' Cactus and Hordes ( Am i right? xd) *'''Variations: OFC nothing!''' *'''Tip:''' Its better to be solo when you escape a horde , also useful in any biomes. I think Scorpions cant knock u back. *'''Author:''' Sparkier_Playzz A.K.A Sparky ( AYYY ITS ME AGAIN) * === '''stronger wing roll''' === '''''"i hate scropions"''''' * '''[iris,stringer],wing,wing,pincer,wing,wing,pincer,wing,wing,pincer:''' # '''second loadout: [lotus,iris,stringer,anntane],[leaf,yucca],jelly,[leaf,yucca],[leaf,yucca],jelly,[leaf,yucca],[leaf,yucca],jelly,[leaf,yucca]''' * '''How it Works:pincer to slow beetles and others,wing to attack,iris/stringer to kill it fast,or lotus to stop poison,jelly to pull mobs away''' * '''Strengths: U- beetles and almost everything''' * '''Weaknesses:scorpion,U&S beetle(why pincer can't slow them down???)''' * '''Variations:maybe nothing''' (optional) * '''Tip:It can works in many places,even in Hel!''' * '''Author:500000marks''' (optional) ==='''Lemme Live!'''=== '''''"you gotta be really incompetent do die with this build"''''' *'''Petals Used:''' L+ Antennae/M+ Fang/M+ Stinger/Pincer/Leaf/Leaf/Sand/Lightning/Magnet/Faster *'''How it Works:''' Antennae = see all, Fang = Quick heal, Stinger = good damage, Pincer = leave me alone, Leafs = consistant heal, Sand = DPS, Lightning = GET OFF ME YOU F***ING ANTS, Magnet = eating drops, Faster = spin faster so that fang heals you more because hits more and the rest also hits more so more DPS and yay. *'''Strengths:''' Hordes of Ants, Beetles, Sandstorm, Shiny (lol) * '''Weaknesses:''' Scorpions if you can't dodge *'''Variations:''' use any other 2 heal petal combination, for example yuccas *'''Tip 1:''' Have reload fully skilled *'''Tip 2:''' it might be a good idea to have a good tank build as secondary *'''Author:''' TheHaitisch === GOMMU GOMMU NO! CANNON! === '''"I HAVE THE POWER OF ANIME ON MY SIDE!"''' * Petals Used: Full Rubbers (Rare+) * Secondary: None * How it Works: When you get hit by ANYTHING you get sent flying, This helps you get away from sandstorms, beetles, scorpions, and ant hills * Strengths: Helps you get away from high rarity mobs * Weaknesses: Rubber breaks easily, * How to get: Destroy termite mounds till you get enough rubber * Variations: Use sponge/heals to heal Damage from hits * Tip: Have the Second chance Tp To survive hits from mythic+ * Author: Chaotic coops ==='''Scorpion/Beetle meat grinder'''=== '''''"100% fresh desert insect meat from the desert butcher"''''' *'''Petals Used:''' Lotus, Leaf, Pincer. (assembly is your choice) *'''How it Works:''' Hit the enemies with pincers to deal poison damage and slow them down. Use Lotus to evade poison damage dealt by Scorpions. *'''Strengths:''' Strong Beetles an Scorpions * '''Weaknesses:''' Big crowds of low-level enemies *'''Variations:''' replace pincer with grape or iris. *'''Author:''' Toets11 ==='''The Sandstorm'''=== '''''"Destroying My Own Kind am I right?"''''' *'''Petals Used:''' Third Eye , Mysterious Powder M+ , Wing M+ , Faster M+ , Fangs M+ , Wing M+ , Faster M+ , Fangs M+ , Wing M+ , Fangs M+ *'''How it Works:''' Third eye Boosts Range Mysterious Powder Boosts Speed fangs heal Faster and wing makes it look like an actual sandstorm *'''Strengths:''' Sandstorms cause long range and quick speed * '''Weaknesses:''' high range mobs because you ain't getting the chance to reach them for the fangs to heal *'''Tip:''' Reload Talent *'''Author:''' AbsolPlayZ === The God === : ''"'''I'm the god , pray me!'''"'' * '''Petals Used:''' Talisman, Laser(2x), Rose, Powder, Relic, Web, Wax, Pearl, Clover(all petals should be L+ or higher rarity) * '''How it Works:''' Talisman evades the attacks, laser helps you to attack enemies far away, rose heals you, relic increases your maximum health, web helps you to escape mobs, wax helps to block mobs, pearl also work as laser, clover increases your luck * '''Strengths:''' Works best on centipedes * '''Weaknesses:''' NONE! * '''Variations:''' You can replace talisman into chip, rose into yucca or other healing petals, powder into bubble, relic into cactus, web into pincer, wax into moon rock, clover into dice. * '''Tip:''' Its important to use 10th loadout talent, also use antenna or antenna talent. * '''Author:''' rsmeowboyz {{Builds2}}

title: Builds - Factory
content:
{{Builds - Scenario|Factory}}{{Background|图片=Factoryb.png|大小=2000px}}


__TOC__


=== The Disassembler ===
'''''"Cold and unblinking, The Disassembler wanders the Factory, killing all in its path. {{Rarity (Unofficial Extension)|Tormented}} souls follow it, ethereally bound to its shadow self. All quake in fear when they hear its name spoken, and no sane flower would ever go looking for it."'''''

* '''Petals Used:''' 1x U+ [[Rubber]], 1x U+ [[Stinger]], 1x U+ [[Sand]], 1x U+ [[Fang]], 1x U+ [[Cotton]], 1x U+ [[Sponge]], 1x S+ [[Iris]], 1x S+ [[Lightning]], 1x U+ [[Faster]], 1x [[Golden Leaf]]
{{Petal|Rubber|Ultra}}{{Petal|Stinger|Ultra}}{{Petal|Sand|Ultra}}{{Petal|Fang|Ultra}}{{Petal|Cotton|Ultra}}{{Petal|Sponge|Ultra}}{{Petal|Iris|Super}}{{Petal|Lightning|Super}}{{Petal|Faster|Ultra}}{{Petal|Golden Leaf|Ultra}}

* '''How it Works:''' This build tears through Mecha mobs with rancor, dealing tons of damage every second, while the Golden Leaf decreases the reload so your petals can destroy more and faster. Rubber and Cotton are there to help with Lightning damage, and the Sponge paired with the Fang will drastically slow your death. The {{Rarity|Super}} Iris and Lightning bypass armor and are key to this build.
* '''Strengths:''' '''The Disassembler''' is extremely powerful in Factory, which is where it's meant to be used; it's also good generally elsewhere.
* '''Weaknesses:''' Ranged mobs put T'''he Disassembler''' at a disadvantage, however using a variation can counteract this problem.
* '''Variations:''' Having problems? Not to fear, this build can be slightly modified to counteract its weaknesses.
** '''Against ranged mobs:''' Switch out the Sand for a [[Third Eye]]. This should be enough, but if it isn't, equip some [[Plank|Planks]] in your second loadout and switch them in when you're getting low.
** '''PvP:''' {{Rarity (Unofficial Extension)|Excruciating}} when used against other flowers, this build should not require tweaks, but a [[Dandelion]] or two should ensure players unfortunate enough to be caught by '''The Disassembler''' shall be quickly killed and join the '''''{{Rarity (Unofficial Extension)|Tormented}}'''''  souls above.
* '''Tip:''' Don't die, don't mark, revive people, be nice, use this responsibly, '''DON'T CLAIM IT AS YOURS OR I WILL FIND YOU''' 
* '''Author:''' Saltpetal (Sandstorm_XD in florr.io) (Thank you to the author of the Rarity Extension Template.)

=== Build for fast Factory mobs ===
"This one requires a plank"

Petals Used: 1 Pincer 3 anything 1 healing 1 Pincer 3 anything 1 plank


How it Works: Pincer slow down Spiders and Mecha Flowers and anything destroys mobs. Use Plank to block missiles and heal to overheal Crabs.

Strengths: Mecha Spider

Weaknesses: Mobs with much higher rarities than your pincer and Players.

Tip: Get reach and reload talent

Tip 2: magnet is useful but not reqired


Author: 6

=== Prism Spree ===
"Slice em' mechs"

===== Petals Used: =====
l+ rubber(m+ antennae for secondary)/u+ pollen/m+ light/yin Yang(m+ disc for secondary)/×3 m+ laser(preferred u+)/m+ plank(preferred u+)/m+ light/u+ starlish

===== How it Works: =====
Laser hits multiple enemies and pierces through armour since it deals lightning damage. Lights to make lasers stay close together. Yin Yang to keep laser in your attacking path. Disc reduce dmg taken. Rubber absorbs mech crab's laser and mech spider's damage. Also bouncing you off to flee away. Pollen helps dealing damage to mobs chasing you. Plank destroys mech missiles(preferred to be in the said setup to destroy mech flower's cogs). Antennae for sight and starfish for heal.

===== Strengths: =====
Basically everything(in Factory), even players.

===== Weaknesses: =====
Swarms, mech spiders, umech crabs, summoners(This build isn't recommended for solo)

===== Variations: =====
• You can change starfish to any healing, but it's recommended.

• You can use more light instead of pollen, but you need something to escape mobs more effectively.

===== Tip: =====
• This build is highly recommended playing with big squads.

===== Author: =====
ThaiPerson2

=== The slicer ===

: ''"lets slice some mobs"''

* '''Petals Used:''' Only laser(works best on 10th loadout)
* '''How it Works:''' laser pierces the mobs
* '''Strengths:''' <big>'''EVERYTHING!'''</big>
* '''Weaknesses:''' if you don't equip healing petals
* '''Tip:''' use healing petals!
* '''Author:''' rsmeowboys

===Concer7Avk2 (Coin slaper)===
:''"Cracking, yet... Welp, we need to become an..  ..silent hunter."''
*'''Petals Used:''' Basil, Starfish, Antennae, Plank, Pincer, Faster, Lighting, Coin, Yucca, Magnet.
*'''How it Works:''' Lighting and Coin are main attack petal. So, we also need pincer, very much to decrease the speed of mecha spider. And don't forget to defense!
*'''Strengths:''' Yes. Deal many damage and healing is somehow help you.
*'''Weaknesses:''' Is about need to attack one by one mobs, and somewhat very fragile with ultra, super and unique mobs. Also need {{Rarity (Unofficial Extension)|Mythic|Mythic+}} petal.
*'''Variations:''' Change Antennae to Mech Antennae. Main attack and faster will replace with Mech Missile!
*'''PvP:''' Make any flower below the {{Rarity (Unofficial Extension)|Mythic}} rarity will {{Rarity (Unofficial Extension)|Unrelenting|destroyed|text=destroyed}} absolutely, and also pretty effective for fighting with {{Rarity (Unofficial Extension)|Mythic}} and {{Rarity (Unofficial Extension)|Ultra}} flowers.
*'''Tip:''' Just move slowly and if have, play with other flower!
*'''Author:''' VALRAYVN florr-Adleast

title: Builds - Garden
content:
{{Builds - Garden|Garden}} __TOC__ == Builds == === '''No Skill''' === '''''"Spam"''''' * '''Petals Used: In order:''' Antennae/Light/Bone/Fang /Pincer/ Soil/Pincer/ Lightning/Leaf /Faster * '''How it Works:''' Hold left click and go near a mob. * '''Strengths:''' Body damage mobs like bees. * '''Weaknesses:''' Hornets. Just don't. * '''Variations:''' Change cacti to cutter. * '''Tip:''' Try not to damage the leaf. * '''Author:''' Behind you. === '''Maze Survivalist''' === '''''"Hornets? I don't see any hornets!"'' Petals Used:''' 4x M+ Salt, 3 Basil, 2x M+ Yucca, 1 M+ Rose (Put a Magnet in this backup slot) * '''How it Works:''' Stay into the defensive position most of the time. This is important for your Yucca. '''Against Hornets:''' Get the hornet missiles to hit the salt, slowly killing them as your Yucca and Rose heals you from the missiles that don't hit the Salt. '''Against Spiders:''' Hit the spider '''once'''. As you take poison damage, so will the spider, but your healing petals will neutralize (or at least weaken) the poison. * '''Strengths:''' It is very powerful against hornets and spiders. * '''Weaknesses:''' It is weaker against creatures with less body damage. * '''Variations:''' You can replace the Yucca with M+ Leaves or M+ Starfish. This will change the effectiveness slightly. * '''Author:''' Sandstorm_XD in florr.io, MiStYsTaR on Discord. ==='''Temite killer'''=== “10% corn 90% death” Petals: L+rock M+stinger M+corn M+stinger L+ rock M+stinger L+rock M+wing M+ wing M+ yucca Explain: stingers will do high damage while the rocks shield them. The corn was for the slapstick joke but can also deal high damages Through multi hitting because of high health and large hit box. The wings are for range and to aggravate mobs from long range. The yucca is for heal. strengths: anything that is not too fast and uses body damage weaknesses: beetle and hornet tip: put in U+faster instead of yucca if you are high leveled ==='''The Auto-Gunner'''=== '''''"Kid from diep"''''' *'''Petals Used:''' M+ Missile / Missile / Missile / Missile / E+ Light / Magnet / (healing) / Egg / Egg / Egg. 10th slot: [Egg/Faster] *'''How it Works:''' The missiles shoot and the light crams them together for improved accuracy. Eggs automatically target mobs while you gun them down. A Faster is optional, but it can help your missiles revolve into position faster. *'''Strengths:''' Garden mobs except for Hornets and Bees. A decent build for [[Centralia Maze]]. *'''Weaknesses:''' Hornets, Bees, and Ant Holes (you are left defenseless when you enter since your eggs need to reload). *'''Variations:''' Eggs can be swapped out for Sticks, depending on the user's preference and number of good petals. (the author leans more toward Sticks) *'''Tip:''' A good strategy would be to stay near the back of a group of stacked players and get some damage in with your Missiles. *'''Author:''' that creeper guy ===A Quick Poke In The Eye=== '''''"The most essential build for any flower from Lvl 30 ~ 60"''''' *'''Petals Used:''' Loadout1: Lfaster/Elight/Elight/Eleaf/Lsalt/Lfaster/Magnet/Eantennae Loadout2: Eleaf/Estinger/Lclaw/Estarfish/Estarfish/Eleaf/Ldahlia/Lrose *'''How it Works:''' The lights are your main offensive petals. The fasters will make your lights act kind of like a deathwheel while hornets and now-poisonous-spiders will be take cared by the salt. The leaves and starfishes (when health is very low) are natural healing while the dahlia and rose is when you need to quickly regain health. Magnet is for any mob killed by the salt.i *'''Strengths:''' Mostly all Common ~ Legendary mobs (with the exception of bees) will be easy if your lights and fasters are the highest rarity accessible (meaning craftable). *'''Weaknesses:''' bees, Mythic, and Ultra mobs. Also don't bring this build to ocean or PvP tho *'''Variations:''' Put eggs, stick, or corn. see if they work *'''Author:''' pokeUReyeOUT (thats my florr.io username) === Spider ripper (and also ants and ladybugs.) === '''''"Hello Spider, you like honey? Well, I've got a plan to kill you with it!"''''' *'''Petals Used:''' Epic+ egg, Epic+ shell, Epic+ honey, Epic+ egg, Rare+ pearl *'''How it Works:''' The honey attracts ''almost'' everything except hornets and bees. The reason the bees don't need to be dealt with is because they are passive. To deal with the hornets, use friendly mobs to battle them. The shell adds to your health, and the pearl can ''slice'' through the Unusual annoying hornets. The friendly mobs will also battle the spiders, ants, ladybugs, and centipedes. *'''Strengths:''' All mobs that '''are not''' Epic, Legendary, Mythic, Ultra, or Super in the Garden. *'''Weaknesses:''' Epic, Legendary, Mythic, Ultra, or Super mobs ;). You will have to find another build or get higher honies. *'''Variations:''' Throw a Yggsdrail, Bubble, antennae, cutter, clover, or anything useful in there. Also, put more honey. * '''Tip:''' '''WHATEVER YOU DO, DO NOT, I REPEAT, DO NOT PUT URANIUM IN THERE!!!!!!!!!!!!''' *'''Author:''' I don't have a Fandom account. === '''Seasoned Leaves -=- by [[User:WintiBear|WintiBear]] (user page)''' === * '''Petals Used:''' (rarity is recommended) E+ Leaf x6 / R+ Salt x2 (higher the salt rarity, the better) * '''How it Works:''' Helps players defend and heal themselves easily, while still doing damage to the enemy! During later waves, hornets appear more and more, eventually grouping up and taking down flowers. With this build, players can shift, and run away while the damage reflection takes care of the work. * '''Strengths:''' As a defensive build, it is perfect for hornet swarms. * '''Weaknesses:''' If players use this offensively, they are exposed, and the lack of any offensive petals can endanger flowers. Plus, Mythic-type hostile mobs can tear apart flowers with this build (if they're not being careful) * '''Variations:''' You can put petals like the Cutter, more Leaves, or even offensive petals like Stingers in your pocket so you can switch leaves or salt out with them if the current wave is more passive, or more aggressive. * '''Tip:''' Einstein Hornets do predict where the player is going, so it is much required for running away for hornets to make sure you dodge at least a majority of the missiles. ==='''Meggstick (outdated)'''=== '''''"Who needs lightning?"''''' [[File:Meggstick.png|thumb|Note: a mweb is used here because the same strategy is being used in desert.]] *'''Petals Used:''' Sticks, mythic eggs, L+ magnet *'''How it Works:''' Sandstorms and legendary beetles spawned by the eggs do all the work for you, while magnet collects all you need. *'''Strengths:''' Blocking hornet missiles, getting to high waves while afk *'''Weaknesses:''' Any unusually powerful mobs like mythic hornets, legendary/mythic centipedes/evil centipedes etc. *'''Variations:''' You can use other ranged/summoning petals if you don't have enough sticks and meggs *'''Tip:''' Don't be greedy and try to grab drops before the end of a wave. '''
Deadly sting''' ''"A few hit and '''DEAD'''!"'' * '''Petals Used''': 5 Stinger/Cactus/2 Rose /Web/Antennae (All should be L+) * '''How it works''' : Get closer the mob and launch web then use the stinger to kill the mob. Rose will heal for you. * Strengths : Quickly kill the mob. * Weaknesses : Can't deal with lech and a little bit hard to with hornet. Require really good skill from player to control. Can't deal with higher raity mobs than all petals. * '''Variations :''' You can replace Cactus with Magnet or Rose with Dahlia or any healing petals ( But have to high healing ) * Tip : Use keyboard movement for a better control. Launch web when you are close to the mob so you can kill it with stinger easier. * Author : AppleBlaze on Florr.io and AppleBlaze#0068 on discord ==== '''Salt Nuke''' ==== '''”TACTICAL NUKE INCOMING!”''' * '''Petals Used''': 8 L+ Salt, 1 L+ Powder and 1 E+ Cutter * '''How it works:''' All salt can be used for high damage, Level 125+ is recommended and also powder for catching up to your enemy, The cutter is for the body damage. * '''Strengths:''' Spiders (L) Rock (any type) Any mob (C to L) * '''Weaknesses:''' Mhornets, Mbees, Any mythic that can screw you up. And players with U+ petals (pvp) * '''Variations:''' 1966 build (10 M salt+) * '''Tip:''' Use Lcutter if you have it! * '''Author:''' Topper from florr.io ==='''Corny Shield'''=== '''''"Bad joke, sorry ha-ha..."''''' ''NOTE: THIS IS NOT A JOKE BUILD, THE SLOGAN IS THE JOKE.'' *'''Petals Used:''' 5x Unusual Corn, 5x Rose (Common or Unusual) *'''How it Works: The Rocks can be used to attack and defend, if you're low on health, you can swap one of the Rocks with the Roses and switch them back when you're on full health.''' *'''Strengths:''' Centipedes, Bees, Hornets, weak Ant types like Baby Ants, Worker Ants, and Soldier Ants, Ant Hills, Queen Ant, and Evil Centipedes (if played correctly) and inexperienced players * '''Weaknesses:''' Hornet Swarms, Spiders (if on low health), Ant colonies (groups of ants), Queen Ant (if played badly), almost all other players in PvP * '''Variations:''' If you have enough, you can use Stingers instead, but it's easily penetrable. *'''Tip:''' Farm Rocks to craft better Rocks to replace the Corns if you're feeling that way, be lucky though! * '''Author:''' BFDIFan2763 on florr.io ==='''Light/Salty Build (For new lv45ers)'''=== '''''"Hornet ripper"''''' *'''Petals Used:''' cutter, magnet (3-4 epic+ lights or leg+ lightning, 2-3 leafs for the light build (basically totaling 10+ heal rate), 3-4 leafs, starfish, or yucca (basically totaling 15+/sec heal rate 20+ for big hornet swarms) along with 1-2 rare+ salts for salty build) *'''How it Works:''' When there are few hornets, use the light build to strip down the hornets. When there are many hornets, they will suffer light but constant damage as you run away with the salty build. Attack when e-centipedes and/or spiders approach. *'''Strengths:''' Few hornets / hornet swarms * '''Weaknesses:''' Centipedes (takes slightly longer to get rid of them), scattered weak passive mobs (pain to find them) * '''Variations:''' You may use yuccas or starfish for the light build as well, but be prepared if you meet a digger... However, you may use antennas, stingers, or other petals for the light or salty builds as well. *'''Tip:''' Use the light build for everything else in garden as well, although using heavy builds would work marginally better against centipedes (but fail in the long run because of gaps between the petals due to reload or using healing petals) * '''Author:''' Anonymous ===Healthy Leaf-Lightning=== '''''"Like leaf-lightning, but more likely to survive lagging into a hornet swarm."''''' *'''Petals Used:''' leaf/magnet/leaf/lightning/leaf/cactus/leaf/lightning. In inventory: antennae/claw/pollen×6 *'''How it Works:''' Very similar to the classic leaf-lightning build, but with more HP. This extra HP is especially useful for players with a tendency of lagging into hornets (ie, me). The leaves heal and the lightning damages mobs. Switch on the claw when a L/M hornet spawns. Use pollen if there is a spider wave. *'''Strengths:''' Good against general mobs swarms, since the lightning can damage many mobs at once. The claw makes the build decent against L/M hornets. *'''Weaknesses:''' Falls short to large hornet swarms, since hornet missiles can destroy the Lightning petal. Weak in a bee/hornet waves, since the lightning attracts swarms of bees. *'''Variations:''' Replace the cactus with another lightning, which makes the typical leaf/lightning build. Keep a uranium in the inventory for clearing rare+ ant holes. *'''Author:''' [[User:AquaticHamster101|AquaticHamster101]] ===Shield of Death and Protection === '''''"Kill noobs, grind petals and levels, destroy swarms, and destroy everyone!"''''' *'''Petals Used:''' light x6(epic or better)/egg x3 (epic or better). In inventory: roses x6 (epic or better)/light x2 (epic or better)(for extra protection) *'''How it Works:''' When you right click, it creates a wall that hornet bullets cannot pass through. The things you summon with your egg kills of the hornets when they fire at you (MAKE SURE TO TRY TO DODGE THE MISSILES INSTEAD OF STANDING THERE). The wall of lights also blocks spiders. Even though the lights have low health, because it keeps rotating, the lights will not be destroyed. After killing the swarm, press "x" to heal. *'''Strengths:''' Good against swarms, especially hornets, also can be used to shred low level players in PVP, and extremely versatile. The things you spawn with your eggs can also attack multiple targets, or can destroy one target. The things you spawn can also be a shield. Also good against blocking basically and ranged or normal attack. *'''Weaknesses:''' The lights have low health, which means the wall could be penetrated by other fast spinning builds when your shield is down. Uranium can bypass the shield easily. *'''Variations:''' Replace a light with a faster *'''Tips:''' Try to kill the hornets before they swarm you because right clicking is only for when you are about to die. Left click when you want to shred a player or monster. Also, when somebody gets past your circle of death and defense, right click to insta kill them. *'''Author:''' [[User:Bobz99|Bobz99]] * ===All-Rounder=== *'''Petals Used:''' *Loadout 1: E+ shell /E+ cactus / E+ shell/ E+ leaf/ E+ shell/ E+ leaf/ E+ Light x 4 *Loadout 2: E+ shell/ E+ cactus/ E+ shell/ E+ leaf/ E+ shell/ E+ leaf/ E+ yucca x 4 *'''How it Works:''' This build is made for both offense and defense, and in the case of trying to survive until your teammates spawn, just to survive. If you have 9 slots, only use 2 shells, and if you have all 10, keep everything the same. The purpose of the shells is to allow you to heal whatever damage you have taken using the leafs, since attacks dont go through shield. For offensive means, use the lights, as they will be yor main source of damage. For defensive means(or to just run away from a horde), use the yuccas. It is HIGHLY recommended that all petals be Epic or higher, otherwise it may not work as effectively. *'''Strengths:''' Swarms of hornets, spiders, and allows you to survive until teammates respawn. *'''Weaknesses:''' Getting surrounded, as taking too much damage will kill you. *'''Variations:''' Swapping the cactus out with whatever else you want. You can also swap out the leaves with salt if you are trying to run. * '''Tip:''' ''In progress'' *'''Author:''' Anonymous === ''' Rice Minigun''' === '''''"Pew Pew"''''' * '''Petals Used:''' 5 Rice (Any rarity) (Optional): Replace 2 of the Rice with Faster. *For better protection: 1 Rice, 1 Jelly, 1 Rice, 1 Jelly, 1 rose, 1 Rice, 1 Jelly, 1 Rice, 1 Jelly * '''How it Works:''' It combines Rice with Faster making it a good DPS for new players * '''Strengths:''' Good DPS build for begginers and works better in garden * '''Weaknesses:''' Its bad if you are advanced and if you dont use it in garden and its more focused in damage * '''Tip:''' Try to take as less damage as possible * '''Author:''' [[User:AplexTV|AplexTV]] ==="perfectly balanced"=== '''''"no seriously"''''' *'''Petals Used:''' 4 lights epic or above, 2 stingers epic or above, 1 leaf epic or above, 1 faster epic or above *'''How it Works:''' it is balanced and has healing with heavy hitters but also a lot of light hitters *'''Strengths:''' small swarms and legendary or above single targets *'''Weaknesses:''' big hornet swarm it cannot provide the healing to survive *'''Variations:''' replace a light or stinger with a faster * '''Tip:''' farm garden and for it and it can be good for desert *'''Author:''' a anonymous player ===Spiked Shell=== '''''"A great defense is also a great offense."''''' *'''Petals Used:''' 3 Salts Epic+, 2 leaves Epic+, Cactus Epic+, 2 Lights Epic+ *'''How it Works:''' Most damage you will take will be reflected and/or healed by the leaves, while the cactus provides extra health, and lights provide decent protection. *'''Strengths: Swarms of enemies (IE: hornet, spider, beetle)''' *'''Weaknesses:''' One-hit high damage enemies (IE: bees, scorpions) *'''Variations:''' Replace lights with fasters, or just add more salt * '''Tip:''' This is a good build for grinders. *'''Author:''' Sun Tzu ===Heal, Rip, And Farm=== *'''Petals Used: (in this order) 3 lights (epic+), 3 leaves (epic+), 1 L salt, magnet of your choice (switch with cactus, epic+ if you dont have one), powder (epic+, recommend legendary)''' *'''How it Works:''' acts like a defence/ offensive strat, sometimes hit-and-run (with full hp), could escape hornets, destroy legendary mobs easily, good against almost every mob (except hordes of scorpions), could be used in desert and ocean the same way *'''Strengths:''' useful at escaping hordes or spiders and hornets with powder (and destroying them), salt as damage reflector, 3 lights as damage, 3 leaves as passive regen, magnet for items or cactus for extra hp *'''Weaknesses:''' taking large body damage hits from bees or hornets, basically anything that does a huge amount of damage in 1 shot, this could be avoided if flower health is high enough and you have enough heals * '''Tip:''' '''MUST''' be skilled at dodging missiles for the escaping plan to work and to stay alive longer [[File:Updated build photo.png|thumb|442x442px|use it this way, remove magnet and 8th row cactus if you only have 8 slots]]'''Author:''' A  a  r  o  n (no longer used) TheLuckyAaron (mythic/ultra user, usual normal ant hell grinder) AaronTheLuckyOne (Fandom/ Wiki username) === Saltfish / Tank === '''''"Spiders? Zero! Centipedes? Zero!"''''' * '''Petals Used:''' Cutter, starfish / yucca / leaf, soil, salt in primary loadout. * '''How it Works:''' Cutter provides the main source of damage done, while starfish / yuccas / leaves provide good healing. Soil increases your health and Salt provides a counter against Hornets. It is recommended to only have one-two salts and one soil since multiple soils do not benefit much + less petal space for healing. * '''Strengths:''' Low body damage enemies (like ants and centipedes), low health enemies (like spiders) * '''Weaknesses:''' High body damage enemy hordes (especially spiders, ironically), mythic mobs (high body damage) * '''Variations:''' Additional shells for shield, magnet for drop pickups, cactus for less HP but no slowdown from soil petal. * '''Tip:''' Salt's main function doesn't work with Shells due to the shield protecting from damage, but let you tank hits more. Since this build doesn't utilize the second loadout, you can put any helpful petals so you can swap them in. === Distracter === '''''"Come over here! Now over there!"''''' * '''Petals Used:''' All Honey (Epic and over) * '''How it Works:''' Left click by your mouse. The Honey will spread and leaves a big radius by sending the mobs. * '''Strengths:''' The rarer the honey is, the more mobs that you can feed. * '''Weaknesses:''' The weakness is that the honey deal no damage at all. So if you are with a swarm of hornets, You need another player to defeat all of the hornets. * '''Author:''' An ID User. === Dandelion === '''''"My "petals" will blow into the wind and attack you!"''''' *'''Petals Used:''' Dandelions in all main slots (Rarity of any kind), Healing petals like Rose, Dahlia, Leaf, etc. *'''How it Works: It works just like the new Dandelion entity. If you go into offensive mode, the petals will shoot out just like the Dandelion mob.''' *'''Strengths:''' Rocks, Sponges, Bubbles, and inexperienced players * '''Weaknesses:''' Hornet Swarms, Spiders (if on low health), Ant colonies (groups of ants), Queen Ant (if played badly), almost all other players in PvP * '''Variations:''' Dandelion, Pollen *'''Tip:''' Add some defensive and offensive plants into your inventory in case the Dandelions don't help. If you have a lot of main petal slots, farm more Dandelions to fill in the spaces. *'''Author:''' BFDIFan2763 on florr.io ==='''Budget Tringer'''=== '''''"When M28 runs out of advertisements"''''' *'''Petals Used:''' Rose / (Cactus, Magnet) / Web / E+ Light / E+ Light / E+ Stinger / E+ Stinger / E+ Stinger. 9th slot: Pincer. 10th slot: Stinger *'''How it Works:''' Throw down some webs, then wait until all your stingers reload and are positioned towards the mob. Then quickly rush at the mob and hit it with all your Stingers, which will hopefully one-shot it. If it doesn't, your Cactus, Pincer, and Web will buy some time. *'''Strengths:''' [[Bee|Bees]] and [[Ladybug|Ladybugs]] *'''Weaknesses:''' Everything else in Garden *'''Variations:''' Replace Lights with Pollen. Once you have mythic Stinger you won't need this build anymore * '''Tip:''' If you still only have legendary Stingers use this build to get more * '''Author:''' that creeper guy ==='''Orange Pack'''=== '''''I want more attack and fun''''' *'''Petals Used:E'''+ oranges *'''How it works:Can do sereval damages.Feel fun can make out a star shape! *'''strengths:'''Small pieces mobs like ants,spiders,shell etc. *'''weaknesses:'''[[Hornet]],Lengedary and mythic mobs. *'''Variations:'''Replace with [[Light]] *'''Tip:''':If the hornets shoot at you.Make sure your oranges have enough hp.Else the defense will get lose *'''Author:''' NFT SE === '''Wingwheel''' === '''''"free loot"''''' * '''Stage in game:''' Level 100-150, almost full mythic * '''Petals used:''' 6 or 7 wings (mythic), 1 or 2 shells (have healing under shells), magnet * '''How it works:''' This build works best with a large number of other players. Because of the long range of the wings, you will be safe from most mobs, while being able to collect loot. This build is much more effective than tringers for getting loot, but players might get mad at you for not doing enough damage. This is also an extremely effective build for fighting ultra hornets. * '''Strengths:''' Small numbers of hornets, getting loot quickly * '''Weaknesses:''' Soloing * '''Author:''' yenolard ===Piggyback Kid=== '''''"Wait for me!"''''' *'''Petals Used:''' Heavy/Corn, Wing/Missile, Heavy/Corn, Wing/Missile, Heavy/Corn, Wing/Missile *'''How it Works:''' Use the wing, missile to barely damage enemies while a good kid gets him. * '''Strengths:''' Piggybacking, and barely make it on your own *'''Weaknesses:''' On your own, it's not bad but it isn't good, depending on the rarity of the items equipted * '''Tip:''' Piggy back off of people that have mythic stingers or are lever 90+ or that have a blue name tag. *'''Author:''' Gamer Ray === '''Hornet Killer''' === '''''"yay i kill mhornet"''''' * '''Petals used:''' Cutter/Yucca/Yucca/Salt/Salt/Salt/Cactus/Cactus, if 10 slots add antennae and magnet * '''How it works:''' Hit the missile on purpose for damage reflection. Right click while dodging to heal then repeat. '''DO NOT GET PUSHED BY THE MISSILE IF THE HORNET IS LEGENDARY+, IT WILL DEAL MASSIVE AMOUNTS OF DAMAGE AND KILL YOU.''' * '''Strengths:''' hornets * '''Weaknesses:''' everything else in garden, prepare secondary build unless you have full mythics and above. * '''Tip:''' You can try ramming the hornet too. '''This is not recommended though''' * '''Author:''' florr player (peace#3380) ''''''Invincible Kid'''''' "Can't touch me!"
