If you have more than 6 petal slots feel free to add more heavies to the front, however, make sure to also add heavies to the back or else, you will create a weak spot. *'''Tip:''' You can also extend your petals without boosting and hit back enemies. *'''Author:''' florrj (Florr.io name) ==='''Deadly Centrifuge'''=== '''''"Range, without third eye, ranged petals and wing!"''''' *'''Petals Used:''' (R+ Orange, R+ Yin-yang R+ Orange, R+ Yin-yang, R+ Orange, R+ Yin-yang, R+ Orange, R+ Yin-yang.) *'''How it Works:''' (The Yin-yang petals will make the oranges clustered together and become more deadly. The Yin-yang petals also create more layers, so the oranges get better range.) *'''Strengths:''' (Weak mobs, hitting rare mobs with the orange side.) *'''Weaknesses:''' (The Yin-yang petals will create two empty weak spots, and the Yin-yang side is weak. If enemies get too close the oranges may not be able to hit them and you may die.) *'''Variations:''' (Always use 4 Yin-yang petals, but you could try adding more oranges.) *'''Tip:''' (Use your range to your advantage, but don't let the mobs get too close.) *'''Author:''' florrj (Florr.io name) === '''Hornet's Nightmare''' === '''''"Please feel free to shoot yourself to death, hornet."''''' * '''Petals Used:''' Ul+ Yucca | Ul+ Yucca | Basil | Basil| Salt | Salt | Salt | Salt | M+ Cactus or Soil | M+ Web * '''How it Works:''' Salt reflects damage from missiles while Yucca heals you. Cactus gives you extra health against Spiders and Web slows down the annoying Bees you might have accidentally attacked. * '''Strengths:''' Hornet swarms in Centralia Maze * '''Weaknesses:''' Ultras (they can probably one-shot you), Spider swarms, possibly lag too. * '''Variations:''' Change one of the Salt to magnet or change web for Salt. Can also change a Basil to another healing petal. * '''Tip:''' Don't ever get out of defence position and don't get too close to bees. Keep another build in your secondary slot in case you run into ultras * '''Author''': Florreryay (florr name: "SryBadWifi") === Dandelion Annihilator === '''"They turned bald!!!"''' * '''Petals Used:''' [In any order] (E+ Magnet / R+ Uranium / 8x L+ [leaf, rose]) * '''How it works:''' The magnet picks up items from far away. The uranium deals damage toward the dandelions. The [leaf, rose] heals the player from the uranium. * '''Strengths:''' Great for farming dandelions and can attack them at a long range. * '''Weaknesses:''' It takes forever to kill those annoying hornets and the flower may die to dandelion missiles (if they don't have much health). * '''Variations:''' A few of the healing petals may be switched out with basils. If the player's healing petals aren't strong enough, they may use weaker uranium or a sponge to delay the damage. * '''Author:''' 2357 (Florr.io username) ==='''Flying Oranges'''=== '''''"Somehow looks like a [[Sandstorm]]"'''''*'''Petals Used:''' Antennae/Wing/Faster/Orange/Wing/Faster/Orange/Wing/Leaf/Orange *'''How it Works:''' It has very high range, useful for killing hornets. *'''Strengths:''' One or two hornets in Maze *'''Weaknesses:''' Huge swarms of hornets. *'''Variations:''' In your secondary build, keep a Third Eye (if you have it) and a Claw, Jelly or Plank. (3ye for even more range, Claw, Jelly or Plank kills missiles from hornets. Stingers are not recommended because it takes soooo long to reload.) * '''Tip:''' Fight with a squad if you grind in Maze, but if most petals are Ultra+, you can possibly solo Maze (with high levels and some dodging skills). *'''Author:''' [[User:Florreryay|yayflorr]] ===Solo Play=== '''''"Why are the ants always there?"''''' *'''Petals Used:''' L+Antennae/M+Ant Eggs(Uegg better)/M+Ant Eggs(Uegg better)/Tringer/Tringer/M+Missile/M+Missile/M+Cactus/M+rose/E+Magnet *'''How it Works:''' Basically, this build works for both the beginners and masters. The cactus prevents you dying from a bunch of missiles, while the rose heal you quickly. Tringers are mainly used for blocking the hornets missiles or unexpected enemies, but you can use them to deal some damage and then retreat. Ant Eggs are the main focus of this build. It is important to learn the skill of retreat, which means you can hide behind a wall and wait till the eggs hatch, then you can launch another attack again. The missiles are used in getting drops(especially in a large squad) or dealing damage. *'''Strengths:''' Can retreat anytime and allows the player to launch attacks several times. *'''Weaknesses:''' If there's too many hornets, your eggs might not have enough time to hatch. Because there are only two missiles, you will find that the missiles from hornets often block your missiles. *'''Variations:''' Beetle eggs can be used, but not recommended. *'''Tip:''' You can actually fight solo if you have two Ueggs. *'''Author:''' (no account) ==='''Swinging Army'''=== '''''"I predicted your prediction"''''' *'''Petals Used:''' M light/faster/M+missile/M+missile/M+missile/M+ant eggs/M+ant eggs/L+bubble/L+bubble/Magnet *'''How it Works:''' Use bubbles to dodge the missiles, while the ants provide a wall for you to shoot missiles. *'''Strengths:''' With bubbles, hornets cannot shoot you. (or hardly) *'''Weaknesses:''' Bubbles can be easily damaged. *'''Variations:''' Change magnet to rose. *'''Tip:''' I haven't tested that yet, it may work. *'''Author:''' (no account) ==='''Dandy farmer I'''=== '''''"Puffiest."''''' *'''Petals Used:''' uranium, uranium, lotus, lotus, lotus, lotus, lotus, starfish, starfish, magnet *'''How it Works:''' uranium attacks large area of dandies. lotus makes sure you don't die due to uranium. starfish heals the health you've lost due to dandies and hornets and perhaps uranium. magnet collects drops. *'''Strengths:''' dandy area *'''Weaknesses:''' mobs faster than the player or mobs that can attack from out of the range of uranium. *'''Variations:''' put in more or less uranium, lotus if you find that the uranium is too powerful/not strong enough *'''Tip:''' try to put in one or two planks to block the flying dandy pieces but then the uranium becomes your main issue. *'''Author:''' same author as 'bane of the arthropods' in builds-desert * ==='''Dandy farmer II'''=== '''''"just as puffy."''''' *'''Petals Used:''' lightning, plank, lightning, plank, lightning, plank, lightning, plank, lightning, magnet *'''How it Works:''' lightning hits many dandies at a time (this is advantageous as dandies are often close to one another) while the planks defend against flying dandy bits and hornets. magnet collects drops. *'''Strengths:''' dandy area, perhaps maze *'''Weaknesses:''' most other areas *'''Variations:''' put in healing petals on secondary loadout maybe, planks can't block 100% of flying dandy bits. Or better, put a shell. *'''Tip:''' stay away from hornets. *'''Author:''' same author as 'dandy farmer I'. * ==='''Dandy farmer III'''=== '''''"not very puffy, but still excellent."''''' *'''Petals Used:''' carrot, plank, carrot, carrot, plank, carrot, carrot, plank, carrot, magnet *'''How it Works:''' carrots bounce everywhere scattering dandies while planks defend. magnet for drops. *'''Strengths:''' dandy area *'''Weaknesses:''' essentially everywhere else *'''Variations:''' use missile instead of carrot but that won't hit as many dandies *'''Tip:''' you can fire at hornets, just beware of dandies as you do so. *'''Author:''' same author as dandy farmers I and II. ==='''Dandy farmer IV'''=== '''''"Really, I don't know how this guy can think of so many dandy farmers."''''' *'''Petals Used:''' stick, stick, stick, stick, stick, stick, light, missile, missile, magnet *'''How it Works:''' sandstorms destroy dandies, light gathers sticks and missile, missile hits dandies, magnet gets drops *'''Strengths:''' dandy area, perhaps ant hell *'''Weaknesses:''' everywhere else *'''Variations:''' missile to replace light but the effect weakens as one missile doesn't penetrate the dandy often *'''Tip:''' do not use out of dandy area as this build has not been tested. *'''Author:''' same as all other dandy farmers *If you have tested this build, please comment below as to how you found it, especially out of dandy area. === '''The Storm Petal''' === '''''"Not the sandstorm, it's the storm blade."''''' * '''Petals Used:'''1 or 2 Epic+ Faster, 4 to 6 Epic+ Light.(Blank 2-5 slot) Put anything healing in it or also Magnet.(or put Powder & Web) * '''How it Works:''' Light have a fast recharge, Faster increase rotation speed. * '''Strengths:''' Almost every mob in the game. * '''Weaknesses:'''Hornet, Scorpion, Spider, Beetle and Roach. These mob can easily slice through the storm. * '''Variations:''' Put Cactus, Yggdrasil in it * '''Tip:''' You can place more Faster or Light in order. * '''Author:''' I don't have an account. === '''a-MAZE-ing build I''' === '''''"Maze? What maze?"''''' * '''Petals used:''' (M+) ante, wing, wing, wing, wing, wing, wing, rose, rose, magnet * '''How it works:''' The main threat in the maze is hornets which launch tough missiles from a distance, which makes them hard to approach. So this build uses wing to reach the hornets and deal damage. Antennae allows you to see farther than the hornets (you don't want to be hit by a surprise party). 2 roses can heal you for just a bit more than a hornet missile's damage, and the magnet picks up things for you. It works just as well with other garden mobs. * '''Strengths:''' the garden maze * '''Weaknesses:''' extremely fast-moving enemies (?) and swarms * '''Variations:''' you can put in cacti or soil (the latter is less recommended as it increases the difficulty of dodging the hornet missiles) in place of the wings or you can replace the roses with cacti or wings and get a fridoend to use the 'Medic' build in builds-general. * '''Tip:''' Do not attempt to solo maze if your health is below 121500 or if you have less than 80% ultra cards. * '''Author:''' You guessed it, it's the same author as that of the build 'Medic' in builds-general, and of dandy farmers I, II, III and IV. He's a guy who loves roman numerals. === a-MAZE-ing build II === '''''"I still don't see any maze."''''' * '''Petals used:''' (M+) ante, missile, missile, missile, missile, missile, rose, light, light, magnet * '''How it works:''' Use the missiles to snipe the mobs while the lights concentrate firepower. * '''Strengths:''' The garden maze, except for ant holes and bees. * '''Weaknesses:''' very low defence * '''Variations:''' you can replace missiles with another shootable petal but these aren't as great as missile can auto-navigate at rarities M+. * '''Tip:''' same as build above * '''Author:''' same as build above === a-MAZE-ing build III === '''''"Where is the maze? I can't find it."''''' * '''Petals used:''' (M+) 3rd eye, faster, fangs, stinger, binger, fangs, faster, rock, sand, magnet * '''How it works:''' I'm not actually sure how it works, I've just seen a lot of people using this and I thought it'd be nice for even more people to use it. But here I'll give my interpretation of how it works. The 3rd eye gives extra range for your petals so that they can hit from further away. The stinger and binger deal high burst damage and are capable of shredding mobs one by one. The fangs recover the health that has been lost due to the binger and enemies, rock and sand have a faster reload and can block incoming attacks and deal spread-out damage respectively, fasters increase hitting rate and magnet collects drops. * '''Strengths:''' The garden maze * '''Weaknesses:''' swarms of over 8 mobs * '''Variations:''' you can play around with it, and if your health is below 12150 then definently swap out the binger for fangs. * '''Tip:''' same as build above * '''Author:''' same as build above === Maze shredder === '''''"Ah, so the maze was shredded after all."''''' * '''Petals used:''' (U+) 3rd eye, yin yang, claw, leaf, light, bubble, magnet, light, leaf, claw * '''How it works:''' 3rd eye gives range, claw kills enemies instantly, leaf heals, light packs petals together, and bubble and yin yang gets you through the maze faster. (if it isn't fast how can it be called a shredder???) * '''Strengths:''' The garden maze * '''Weaknesses:''' swarms of over 3 mobs that have been hit by other people * '''Variations:''' do replace light with more bubbles if you don't have ultra bubble. * '''Tip:''' same as build above, and DO NOT USE THIS BUILD IF YOU DO NOT HAVE 100% ULTRA PETALS. * '''Author:''' same as build above === a-MAZE-ing build IV (Team version) === '''''"teaming really makes mazing easier."''''' NOTE: this build is designed for 4 players as the maximum number of players that can get drops from a single mob is 4. * '''Petals used (p1):''' (M+) ante, salt, yucca, starfish, basil, salt, yucca, starfish, basil, mag * '''How it works:''' The first player acts as a kamizake and attracts all the hornets' attacks to keep the others safe. Yucca, starfish and basil heals them while salt reflects lots of damage. It is best that he has over 18k health so that he can survive for a long time. * '''Petals used (p2):''' (M+) ante, wing, wing, wing, wing, wing, wing, rose, rose, mag * '''How it works:''' The second player uses wings to attack behind the first player and mainly deals with mobile mobs. 2 roses is enough to heal while 6 wings is more than enough to get him loot. * '''Petals used (p3):''' (M+) ante, missile, missile, missile, missile, missile, light, plank, light, mag * '''How it works:''' The third player is a sniping guy and can hit mobs from a distance and intercept hornet missiles. However this makes him weak and thus he needs plank to protect him from missiles. * '''Petals used (p4):''' (M+) third eye, faster, rock, sand, stinger, faster, rock, sand, stinger, mag * yggdrasil in secondary * '''How it works:''' The fourth player operates a deathwheel modified especially for the maze and can sub in for any other player when they are low on health. He has an ygg so that he can revive the other players. It is best that he is in the 2 strongest players of the quad. * '''Strengths:''' The garden maze * '''Weaknesses:''' The weaknesses of p1 is over 10 hornets firing together. The weakness of p2 is the death of p1. The weakness of p3 is he has low defence. The weakness of p4 is 2 or more very tough mobs. But put together they have almost no weaknesses apart from being squished by 2 armies of mobs. * '''Variations:''' P1 can put more healing and health petals if he is losing health too quickly and more salt if he fails to get drops; p2 can add rubber because he can't really dodge a volley of missiles; p3 can add in healing petals; p4 can also swap out a few of the petals for rose and dahlia if he wants to heal the others more instead of attacking. * '''Tip:''' Try to keep p4 alive as the others will die out much faster without them. * '''Author:''' same as build above === '''Wheel of Fortune''' === '''''"Just spin the wheel and loot is guranteed"''''' '''Disclaimer: At least 6,000 health is required for safety measures.''' * '''Petals Used (First Build):''' M+ Wing x8, E+ Magnet, L+ Antennae * '''Petals Used (Secondary Build):''' E+ Salt x3, L+ Yucca x7 * '''How it works:''' The wings can hit mobs from far away while keeping a good distance. You can also solo mythic hornets if you're good enough at dodging, just make sure that your wings can hit the hornet. The magnet is there to pick up loot from far away. Sometimes, after you kill a mob, another mob may come running towards you so you won't have time to pick up the loot, so a magnet would be necessary. Antennae lets you detect mobs from far away so you don't get suprise-attacked. When there is a swarm of hornets, switch to the secondary build. The salt will reflect enough damage, so you can (eventually) kill the hornets. Yucca provides healing for you. * '''Strengths:''' Hornets, Hordes of hornets, Most maze mobs * '''Weaknesses:''' Bees? (You may not be able to do enough damage to kill it before it reaches you), Hornets surrounding you (their missles can "sandwich" you, dealing massive damage, if not killing you), mobs cornering you. * '''Variations:''' If you have basils, you can put them in the secondary build. If you don't have enough good rarity yuccas, just use your best healing petals, however, don't use fang, as you won't have the opportunity to attack mobs with the fang and heal yourself. A faster is optional for the first build, as it could make your wings spin faster and increase the hit rate, thus improving your overall dps. You can also add a rubber to your secondary build, so that every time you get hit, you get knocked back further and have a higher chance of dodging the missile, giving you time to heal. It could also help if you're "sandwiched" by two missiles, as the rubber will force you out sideways and reduce the damage you take. However, never stay close to a wall, as a missile could knock you into the wall, and then the wall would bounce you back into the missile, continuing the loop and therefore doing tons of damage. * '''Tips:''' Stay with a group, preferably a group of 3 mythic users. Ultra users will usually kill mobs too quickly for you to be able to get loot. A 6k health requirement is necessary, as using the secondary build could involve getting hit by a hornet missile multiple times (see variations on how to counter this), so you need enough health to survive it (a mythic hornet missile does around 2000 damage). * '''Author:''' a polygon === '''Maze Farmer 2.0''' === '''''"Pfft, these mobs don't stand a chance!"''''' [[File:MazeFarmer2.png|right]] * '''Petals Used:''' M+ Stinger (x5, 6 or 7), L+ Shell (x1), Magnet (x1), E+ Rose (x1 or 2), Yggdrasil (x1, if you have it) * '''How it Works:''' Basically just kill mobs for petals in the maze! These won't stand a chance. * '''Strengths:''' If you can craft a M Missile, then hornets spawn everywhere! ''(be careful with a swarm of dem and ultra tho)'' * '''Weaknesses:''' You need a squad (With at least 1 [[Yggdrasil]] user, 3 or more players) with you. * '''Variations:''' Replace Magnet with E+ Antennae or L+ Blood Stinger. * '''Tip:''' You can get yourself a library full of L petals. * '''Author:''' Viostarlton (lost account) === '''Queen Ant''' === '''''"You are the queen ant!"''''' * '''Petals Used: In order:''' 9x L+ Ant Eggs & E+ Magnet. * '''How it Works:''' Your lovely soldier ants will protect you from any mobs when you afk and the magnet will collect petals. * '''Strengths:''' Everything below or same as your Egg's level. * '''Weaknesses:''' Everything above. * '''Variations:''' Beetle egg ( If you want to become Queen Beetle ). * '''Tip:''' Find a place to farm, leave your flower there and go out for work until the rest of the day. * '''Author:''' P3NYS my florr account === '''The faster deathwheel''' === "this would kill every thing outta its side" DISCLAMER: this only needs up to L fasters. * Petals used: ALL faster (L+ UP) * How it works: it just increases speed, so it just does make it more dmg if u include hp * NOTE: WIP! ==='''Tanker'''=== '''''"Mythic hornet? Where? (because you just killed it X_X)"''''' *'''Petals Used:''' M+ Glass, M+ Missile, M+ Wing, M+ Coin, L+ Cutter, M+ Rose, L+ Bone x2, L+ Sponge, L+ Stinger *'''How it Works:''' Rips almost any mob apart *'''Strengths:''' Everything *'''Weaknesses:''' Nothing *'''Tip:''' Use higher rarities if you have them. *'''Author:''' TOPHATCO ==='''Papershredder'''=== '''''"GO TO HELL MOBS"''''' *'''Petals Used:''' 9xM+ Light (with duplicator),1xM+ Faster *'''How it Works:''' Aggro a Mob, than run and extend your petals. *'''Strengths:''' Good for tearing missiles, spiders, bees, centidedes, ants(of any kind) and ant hole. *'''Weaknesses:''' Might not work against ant hole sometimes because of the fact that light is meant to deal with ONE mob (with avg health) * '''Variations:''' NIL *'''Tip:''' NIL *'''Author:''' Vantawhite === '''HornetDeathMode''' === '''''"No. More. Ranged. Mobs. EVER!!!"''''' * '''Petals Used:''' M+plank / M+light / M+plank / M+ light / M+plank / L+missile / L+missile / L+missile / L+missile / E+magnet * '''How it works:''' Swap magnet with YY to align missiles. The light is for bunching up missiles and plank for defence. Hold this in defensive regularly and swap a plank for yucca if low. Press attack quickly once missiles are lined up, and enjoy easily killing hornets. * '''Strengths:''' Good against Hornets and also works against Wasps and Mantes (the plural for mantis). This build works for jungle (maybe even more so) and can slowly kill M+ enemies. Stationary enemies can also be defeated easily but would take more time than a deathwheel or dps build. * '''Weaknesses:''' Mobs with a high speed due to this build's 'chip away' characteristic. Fast mobs includes spiders, beetles, leeches, roaches and more. * '''Variations:''' Replace a missile with web or pincer to be safer with fast opponents. Swap magnet with antennae or another missile if you have the magnetism trait. * '''Author:''' CO0L_D (florr username) Join my guild if you see me! * '''Extra:''' I would like to know if you found this build helpful. If so, write a ! in the tally following -> ! === Bee Killer 9000 === '''''"Enjoy your stay at Hel, you striped rammers!"''''' * '''Petals Used:''' L+ Pincer, 3 M+ Glass, 2 M+ Web, 2 L+ Yucca, L+ Rose, (ANY RARITY)Magnet * '''How it Works:''' Pincer can stab bees and annoying spooders which makes them slow and easy to kill, Glass can kill anything blocking your way or attacking you, Web can make them '''EVEN MORE SLOWER''', Yucca heals you fast while Rose makes your healing 3x efficient. * '''Strengths:''' Kills bees, spiders and some ants fast, can decimate M- hornet and stationary mobs. * '''Weaknesses:''' M+ Hornets can stab you with their einstein-powered missile, large hordes of Bees or Spiders can kill you fast. * '''Variations:''' Replace Yucca with any op healing petal you currently have (except Rose since these petals tend to heal in bursts). Swap Magnet with a another glass for more '''damn'''age (if you have magnetism talent enabled) * '''Tip:''' Best used in the Bee zone in Garden. (bottom right inside the almost surrounding oval) * '''Author:''' TnT_Userbruh {{Builds2}}

title: Builds - General
content:
{{LongPage}}{{Builds - General}} __TOC__ == Builds == === Full Tri WoD === '''''"Nobody ever writes anything anymore so I'm here to add some common builds here."''''' * '''Petals Used:''' 9U Tri, 1U Faster{{Petal|Triangle|Ultra}}{{Petal|Triangle|Ultra}}{{Petal|Triangle|Ultra}}{{Petal|Triangle|Ultra}}{{Petal|Triangle|Ultra}}{{Petal|Triangle|Ultra}}{{Petal|Triangle|Ultra}}{{Petal|Triangle|Ultra}}{{Petal|Triangle|Ultra}}{{Petal|Faster|Ultra}} * '''Secondary''': Whatever you want. * '''How it Works:''' Deals high dps, sacrifising other utilities such as healing and slowdown. * '''Strengths:''' Ants, Slow contact damage mobs, Super mobs with a megasquad. * '''Weaknesses:''' Ranged mobs, Fast mobs * '''Variations:''' If you use [[Triangle|Triangles]], don't seek for any variations because they decreases overall DPS, and this is a DPS build. * '''Tip:''' Good at Super hunting. * '''Author:''' ? === '''Rice n' Slice''' === '''''"Get DPS'd"''''' [[File:Rice DPS death.png|thumb|741x741px|Rice]] * '''Petals Used:''' Magnet, Light, M+ Rice, High damage petal (stinger or smth, I used mecha missile because its the only ultra I have), M+ Rice, M+ Pincer, Light, Letil, Rose, Poo(Why not) * '''Secondary''': Whatever you want, 2x yin yang * '''How it Works:''' Put speed to 0, then spam yin yangs to make the rice and high damage petal point at mobs. Pincer slows it down and Lentil is so you don't miss. Magnet for healing. * '''Strengths:''' Ants, contact damage mobs * '''Weaknesses:''' Ranged mobs * '''Variations:''' Use more rice, or mabye Plank to stop projectiles? * '''Tip:''' SPAM * '''Author:''' TheSnast === THE ULTIMATE TRI WOD === '''''all you really need for a tri build''''' * '''Petals Used:''' primary = 7 utri (or 8 I just don't have) of course a faster, and I like a relic and a stall (web, jelly, pincer) especially in AH. * secondary = 3 rose (m+) 5 yucca (m+ best at u) 1+ basil magnet * '''How it Works:''' shred with triangles * '''Strengths:''' ants and stuff * '''Weaknesses:''' spideys * '''Author:''' shifthold (add your name in the brackets if this helped you) [ ] === '''Param Czilovch''' === '''''"Yea, a good beginning for all {{Rarity|Ultra}} players!"''''' * '''Petals Used:''' Basil, Faster ({{Rarity|Mythic}}+), Yucca ({{Rarity|Mythic}}+), Starfish ({{Rarity|Mythic}}+), Web, Sand ({{Rarity|Mythic}}+), Glass '''2×''' ({{Rarity|Mythic}}+), Coins ({{Rarity|Ultra}}+), Lightning ({{Rarity|Mythic}}+). * '''How it Works:''' Glass is the "damage creator", so this maybe not take affect with {{Rarity|Ultra|Ultras}} mob... * '''Strengths:''' DPS very good (>'''50 000''' DPS)! * '''Weaknesses:''' You can easily died and heal it's so slow yet. * '''Variations:''' If the map contains spider, please replace web with pincer ({{Rarity|Mythic}}+). * '''Tip:''' Good to farm in {{Rarity|Mythic}} zone. * '''Author:''' Adleast ''(florr.io)''; VALRAYVN florr-Adleast ''(fandom)'' === Eggs of Doom for AFK === '''''"Hey, ants! Oh wait, I'm dead."''''' * '''Petals Used:''' M dahlia, M antegg, M sand, M bloodstinger, U bur, U leaf, M antegg, U iris, U beetleegg, U wing * '''How it Works:''' When ultras/mythics swaarm you during afk, wing=range, eggs keep mobs back and bur+bloodstinger for faster bombing * '''Strengths:''' anthell afk * '''Weaknesses:''' spiders * '''Variations:''' you can replace sand with web * '''Tip:''' afk in a corner * '''Author: Antarctica''' === '''Generic Ultra Build''' === '''''"For lack of a better name"''''' * '''Petals Used:''' 1 [[Third Eye]], 1 U+ [[Dahlia]], 1 U+ [[Orange]], 1 U+ [[Iris]], 1 M+ [[Sponge]], 1 U+ [[Fangs]], 1 U+ [[Sand]], 1 U+ [[Wing]], 1 U+ [[Lightning]], 1 M+ [[Faster]] (but I use Ultra) * '''YOU ''NEED'' MYTHIC SECOND CHANCE''' (and Duplicator is strongly recommended) * '''How It Works:''' This is just a generically good build anywhere. The offensive petals can do around 55,000 damage a second (at the rarities offered here) while the Sponge works in tandem with your Dahlia, which heals you quite consistently, and your Fangs, which heals whenever it harms. * '''Strengths:''' Mob-crowded areas, because your Fangs will be able to heal you the most, and also it can loot Supers rather consistently. This is good anywhere, provided you know how to properly use a Sponge. * '''Weaknesses:''' If you don't know how to use a Sponge, don't use this build until you do. Also, this build doesn't do well against swarms of ranged mobs. * '''Variations:''' This build can be slightly modified for each biome, view below: ** '''Garden:''' Add another Ultra healing petal. This will help you survive swarms of [[Hornet|Hornets]]. ** '''Desert:''' Switch the Orange and Sand with M+ [[Pincer]] or U+ [[Web]]. ** '''Ocean:''' This build is actually kind of perfect for Ocean! My only word of advice is if you're farming in the [[Starfish (Mob)|Starfish]] zone, switch out Orange for M+ [[Dandelion]]. ** '''Jungle:''' Switch out Orange, Iris, and Sand with (U+) [[Plank|Planks]]. ** '''Hel:''' pincer is nice ** '''Ant Hell:''' Switch out the Orange for a U+ [[Bone]]. If this isn't enough, switch out the Sand for another one. If that's not enough, switch out the Iris. If ''that's'' not enough, you should probably just use a Bone deathwheel build or maybe one of [[Builds - Ant Hell|mine]]. ** '''Sewers:''' People will yell at you for using Lightning, because it aggros [[Roach|Roaches]]. Just use something else in place of that. ** '''Factory:''' Switch a Starfish for a M+ Pincer and Lightning with a U+ Plank. Add more Planks as needed, just remember that all mobs in Factory (except [[Barrel]]) have higher-than-average armor and that Poison and Lightning damage bypass them. Also, you can add one or two M+ [[Rubber]] if you want, but I find them unneeded if you're careful. * '''Tip:''' Revive people and be kind! * '''Author:''' Sandstorm_XD in florr.io, Saltpetal on Fandom. (For those of you who recognize the florr name but not my username, I lost access to my old account, Kitten with Headset, so I made a new one so as to keep contributing to this wiki. (STAFF I DIDN'T DO ANYTHING BAD I DIDN'T LOSE ACCESS BECAUSE OF BEING PUNISHED I SWEAR)) * Also, LoafCat, if you're still here, stay away from this. === '''Build for fast mobs''' === '''''"hey hit me oh your dead oh well"''''' * '''Petals Used:''' 1 Pincer 4 anything 1 Pincer 4 anything * '''How it Works:''' Pincer slow down mobs and anything destroys mobs. * '''Strengths:''' High speed mobs * '''Weaknesses:''' Long range mobs, mobs with much higher rarities than your pincer and roach. * '''Tip:''' Get reach skill * '''Tip 2:''' magnet is useful but not reqired * '''Author:''' 6 === '''Termite Killer (body damage)''' === '''''"hey hit me oh your dead oh well"''''' * '''Petals Used:''' 3x M+Yucca 4x Basil 1x cutter 1x disc 1x big damage(uwing,M+stinger) * '''How it Works:''' Ram and don't get rammed into a wall * '''Strengths:''' Low-Mid Body damage * '''Weaknesses:''' Long range mobs, Ultra/Super petal * '''Tip:''' Get toxic body damage skill * '''Tip 2:''' magnet is useful but not reqired * '''Author:''' Zimibng === '''Survival of the fittest''' === '''''"ez wins"''''' * '''Petals Used:''' L+Rubber, E+Sponge, Root, Disk, Bulb, hrh*3 (highest Rarity healing, preferably healing per second) Cutter or another hrh, Mag or Clover (Depending on magnetism talent) * '''How it Works:''' You tank and tank until the enemy is no more * '''Strengths:''' Melee mobs of similar Rarity * '''Weaknesses:''' Ranged mobs of higher Rarity * '''Variations:''' use salt Instead of cutter/clover To deal with ranged mobs * '''Tip:''' If you're going AFK with yuka, hold right click Drag your cursor outside of the tab, left click, drag your cursor onto another tab, release right click, Then you'll constantly be in the defensive position until you right click again * '''Tip 2:''' To calculate maximum damage absorption, Multiply your total healing (the healing per second of your healing petals) by the amount of seconds that sponge spreads dmg its across * '''Author:''' kawstik gamez on youtube [[File:Build.png|thumb|440x440px]] === '''The missile shotgun''' === '''''"North Korea in a nutshell"''''' * '''Petals Used:''' 2 M+ light, 5 M+ (preferably {{Rarity|Ultra}}) missiles, pincer and stinger (optional), and yin yang swapping with magnet. * '''How it Works:''' You use yin yang to align your missiles to the target, then fire. 4 ultra missiles with a mythic missile is enough to deal half HP to most mobs. * '''Strengths:''' Hornets, Bees, Beetles, Most garden mobs and Inanimate/passive mobs. * '''Weaknesses:''' Starfish, Flies (those two suck anyway), and Jellyfish. * '''Variations:''' Replace the stinger and pincer for other petals (example: antennae and rubber) * '''Tip #1:''' Using cursor movement instead of keyboard makes things much easier as you don't have you press keys to move and switch the YY at the same time. * '''Tip #2:''' I recommend using the bottom build as an emergency heal build, but you can put other stuff in there. * '''Author:''' TheTripleAAA (florr account) | Namethatisalreadytaken (fandom) | thetripleaaabattery (discord) === '''Td''' === '''''Kenney Rogers "the gambler"''''' Either have one of the highest dps in the game or lowest depends on luck * '''Petals Used:''' Cloverx3,dicex4,cardx2,heal (should all be m+) * '''How it Works:''' either really good or bad not much to it * '''Strengths:''' has chance of EXTEMELEY high damage * '''Weaknesses:''' also can have horrible attack * '''Variations:''' swap cards for either more dice or clovers * '''Tip:''' dont ram not a good idea * '''Author:''' kummerbummer === ^ V2 === * '''Petals Used:''' U Clover x 1, (M - S) dice x 4 ,(M - S)fang x 1 or other heal, U Sand and U Light or U for dps in case the dice fail and antenna (should all be m+) (Improvement since Clover don´t stack anymore) * '''How it Works:''' Works really well with luck talents * '''Strengths:''' has chance of EXTREMELY high damage * '''Weaknesses:''' Fast mobs like spiders * '''Variations:''' Talents put in luck cuz that stacks and you can also replace U light with (M - S) Pincer to slow down mobs * '''Tip:''' don´t ram not a good idea * '''Author:''' Xx_IamVortex_ === '''The ultimate troller''' === '''''"Are the ultras dashing and flying?"''''' * '''Petals Used:''' Antennae, YY, Light(L+), 3x Heavy(L+), Light(L+) Bubble(L+) * '''How it Works:''' Wait until heavies reload, use YY to keep them in place and use bubble, the result: the ultra/super goes flying. * '''Strengths:''' Trolling >:) * '''Weaknesses:''' Practically 0 attack damage. (Don't get ultra/super aggroed on you.) * '''Variations:''' Replace heavies with jelly(not as effective.) * '''Tip:''' Do not get the mob aggroed on you. (BTW YY means Yin Yang) * '''Author:''' G. O. A. T (God Of All Trollers) ==='''Noooooooo more ants !''' === '''''"how 2k l wing in 1 hour??"''''' *'''Petals Used:''' First build: antennae, fangs, bone(U+)*2, basil, shell, rose, iris, faster, Magnet Secondary build: antennae, yinyang, light, jelly, light, powder, bubble*4 *'''How it Works:''' Switch the 8th and 9th petal up to bubble and get ants, use yinyang to bubble quicker and control bone on the ant, bones shred ants and basil with rose heal you, shell protects you *'''Strengths:''' no matter how muchants and not too much termites in a time *'''Weaknesses:''' fire ants due to its massive damage *'''Variations:''' Replace U bones with U Binger or U rice, replace u basil with third eye or starfish, replace fangs with lightning (U+better) *'''Tip:''' press space and shift then tap "2" madly and you moves insaneli forward *'''Author:''' Polarise1 (I'm now farming ants in ah2) '''Ant party V2.0''' "Now with more ants!" * '''Petals:''' 1 shovel and the rest are eggs * '''How it Works, Strengths and Weaknesses:''' same as the first 1 * '''Author: Grassyf0x'''
'''Infinite Immortality''' '''"You can't touch me, Sstinger spammer XD"''' * '''Petals used''': 1 sponge (Any rarity but best L+), the rest all leaf(preferably, because it can ACTUALLY DO DAMAGE), yucca, starfish, dahlia, other fast healing petals as high rarity as possible (PLEASE AT LEAST L+) * '''How it Works''': The sponge will make you take the damage slowly while the healing petals will outheal it (Or at least make you take less damage) and leaf (if used) will deal damage * '''Strengths''': Almost all dmg * '''Weaknesses''': If a monster literally corner you and rek you so much (If you noob like me) or someone with full Sblood stinger with max reload talent rek you but these won't happen much with Ssponge * '''Variations''': Maybe plop in some basil, cotton, soil, cactus, disc, cutter, maybe lotus and other petals that can reduce risk or damage taken * '''Tip''': Don't get cornered and avoid Sstingers (Yeah, the name and slogan means that it can tank some, but not all hits from Sstinger spammers) * '''Author''': (Florr.io account) Endy (yeah that noob is me) '''''THE DONKER''''' '''''"time to donk"''''' * '''''PETALS: heavys and fasters''''' * '''''HOW IT WORKS:''''' '''''donk bugs awayyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyy''''' * '''''STRENGTHS: donking''''' * '''''WEAK TO: not donking''''' * '''''MADE BY: Grassyf0x''''' TheLoafCat do not sabatoge my builds === '''Light saw''' === '''''"Goodbye, nice to meet ya."''''' * '''Petals Used:''' Light/Light/Light/Light/Light/Magnet/Cutter/Claw/Fang/Leaf * '''Secondary Build:''' All healing and necromancing petals * '''How it Works:''' You cheese the mob while you're attacking by running away and it will gradually lower the health down. * '''Strengths:''' Good against mobs that are a little higher rarity than your petals or less. * '''Weaknesses:''' Mobs' rarity greater than your petals. Hornets, wasps and leeches. * '''Made by :''' Pro147/Lost lord ===Light Shredder=== '''''"Hello weak mob, do you wanna die :)"''''' *'''Petals Used:''' (Petals Must be L+) Faster/Light/Rice/Light/Faster/Rice/Faster/Light/Rice/Light *'''Secondary Build :''' Healing Petals, Antenna and Magnet *'''How it Works:''' You attack the mobs and switch any petal with the magnet to collect the loot and quickly switch back and do the same thing with antenna but, for mobs that are stronger than you *'''Strengths:''' Mobs' rarity is/are equal or less than your petals *'''Weaknesses:''' Mobs' rarity greater than your petals and hornets/wasps (or maybe any range mobs if you're not skilled) *'''Variations:''' Mix up the petals and make sure no two of the same petals is touching each other *'''Tip:''' God against ants but not termites (be careful not to get crushed) *'''Author:''' (Florr.io Account) Power *Power_Spy or ThePoWeR or neither? *YY + Rice is just 100x better === '''Just insane DPS''' === '''''"Will kill anything"''''' * '''Petals Used:''' 8-9 U+ Dice/ M+ Clover/ M+ Third Eye (optional) * '''How it Works:''' Dice is one of the strongest damage dealing petals in florr.io. if you somehow get 8-9 U+ dices, it'll shred everything it touches, LITERALLY. Clover is to make each Dice have extra crit chance. Third Eye is if you have skill issue and keep dying somehow. * '''Strengths:''' Ultras and Super mobs * '''Weaknesses:''' Doesn't really work for Mythic mobs since they might kill you in large quantities. * '''Variations:''' Change 1-2 Dice with M+ Rose or M+ Starfish * '''Tip:''' Be sure to level up your luck talent! * '''Author:''' TheLoafCat ==='''The Mythic Shover''' === '''''"Go away, dumb ants!"''''' *'''Petals Used:''' Jelly, Pincer , Light, Jelly, Pincer, Light, Jelly, Pincer, Light, Faster *'''How it Works:''' The jellies push it away, and the pincers slow it down so the jellies work better * '''Strengths:''' Strong fast moving mobs *'''Weaknesses: It cant push ultra mobs away, and pincers dont really work on ultras.''' *'''Variations:''' Switch light for lightning for swarms *'''Tip:''' Use this in a swarm, as it pushes them away '''Ant party''' '''''"Party of the ants"''''' * '''Petals Used:''' poo, leaf, lightning, and the rest are eggs(all L+) * '''How it Works:''' ants kill all,all fight ants, leaf heals you and the ants * '''Strengths:''' most stuff as rare as yore eggs or less rare or sssssssssllllllllllllllloooooooooooooooooooowwwwwwwwwwwwwwwwwwwwwww * '''Weaknesses:''' stuff rarer than yore eggs * '''Variations:''' anything can be substituted for lightning '''EXCEPT''' [[Bulb]] * '''Author: Grassyf0x''' === '''Densewheel''' === '''''"The build wipes away any mythic mobs easily (except hel beetle, queen)"''''' * '''Petals Used:''' 1x Mythic Antennae, 1x Ultra Heavy (REQUIRED), 2x Mythic+ Bone (REQUIRED), 1x Mythic+ Rock, 1x Mythic+ Stinger, 1x Mythic+ Light, 1x Mythic+ Faster, 1x Mythic+ Soil, 1x Mythic+/Legendary+ Disc * '''How it Works:''' The Ultra Heavy will easy wipe out the most mythics, the Mythic bones deals large damages too, and mythic rock deals little bit more larger damage, but reloads more time. * '''Strengths: '''Mobs like such moths or flies or spiders * '''Weaknesses:''' Mobs like Hel Beetles, Termite Overminds * '''Variations:'''Switch stinger for powder, if needed sprint. * '''Tip:'''Use this against spider and ant swarms to farm third eyes or wings. * '''Author:'''King_Bunny ===Carrot party === '''''"It's a wheel of carrots, yum yum”''''' *'''Petals Used:''' Carrots,wings,fasters *'''How it Works:''' carrots fly around,killing whatever thing’s around the corner for you.Wings are good for fighting far distanced and close. *'''Strengths:''' Random dangers around the corner *'''Weaknesses:''' Non-body damage attack mobs (eg. high poison,non ramming mobs) *'''Variations:''' replace carrots with missiles. *'''Tip:''' Don't attempt to use it as an ultra or super killing build.Please,this is just for hiding and attacking. *'''Author:''' CrystalKai12345 ===Tritium Wheel === '''''"It's a wheel of petals"''''' *'''Petals Used:''' 3x corn (mythic+), 1x missile (mythic+), 1x pincer (legendary+), 1x yin yang, 1x iris, 1x rock (mythic+), 1x yin yang, 1x magnet *'''How it Works:''' Corn & rock will do most of the damage, missile for long range, pincer will freeze the mob and allow corn to easily kill it, the 2 ying yangs will create a death wheel effect, and the iris will do high amounts of damage over-time. *'''Strengths:''' Body-damage attack mobs *'''Weaknesses:''' Non-body damage attack mobs (eg. ranged, high poison) *'''Variations:''' Replace magnet with antennae or rose, and replace yin yangs & missile with wings *'''Tip:''' Don't attempt to use it as an ultra killing build. *'''Author:''' Tritium === Light Shredder === '''''"Good DPS"''''' * '''Petals Used:''' 5x M+ Light/ 3x L+Fasters/ U+ Bur/ M+ Third Eye * '''How it Works:''' The Lights will kill the ultras and get drops. The Bur makes the Lights do more damage. The Fasters allow the Lights to hit more and utilize more of it's insanely low recharge. * '''Strengths:''' Good to get drops on Ultras and Supers * '''Weaknesses:''' Wasps and Hornets and everything else that can shoot or deal tons of damage. * '''Variations:''' 7 M+ Sand/ 1 M+ faster/ 1 M+ Bur * '''Tip:''' Ignore Mythic mobs but follow Ultra mobs. * '''Author:''' TheLoafCat ==='''Super Hunter''' === '''''"Every Super Hunter Nowadays"''''' *'''Petals Used:''' 2x Any Super Petal, Ultra Third Eye, 2-4x Ultra Faster, Ultra Bur, Ultra Sand. *'''Secondary Build:''' Ultra Powder, 2x Ultra Light, Super Antennae, 5x Ultra Bubble, Ultra Yin Yang. *'''How it Works:''' Makes sure you can get to Super Mobs quick and get drops *'''Strengths:''' Super Mobs * '''Weaknesses:''' Normal gameplay *'''Variations:''' More Super Petals if u are lucky? *'''Tip:''' You need to be lucky and get 2+ Super Petals before going Super-Mob-hunting because otherwise IT WILL NOT WORK. You will be too slow and be too weak to get drops because those annoying Super Players with their RNG-carry will kick dust in your face. * '''Author:''' HCaterpillar ==='''Not Lucky Super Hunter''' === '''''"Use this if you don't have God Luck"''''' *'''Petals Used:''' Bur, 2-4x Fasters, Lights or Sands, Third Eye. *2nd build: 5-6 Bubbles, 0-1 Powder, 2 Lights, 1 Antennae, 1 Faster or 1 Yin Yang. *'''How it Works:''' It will not work if you don't have Super Petals. *'''Strengths:''' Super Mobs * '''Weaknesses:''' Normal gameplay *'''Variations:''' Well there are a few but Light and Sand are the most effective ones. *'''Tip:''' I'm so, so, sorry :( If you don't have God Luck and multiple Super Petals, you will just be too slow and weak to get drops from Super Mobs! More and more players are getting Super Petals, and that means that the players without them will struggle to compete with them. Maybe, the Florr Economy is just saying to you that you aren't one of the best players anymore, and the competitive economy means that you can't continue Super Hunting anymore :( Trust me, the outside world works this way too, as the rich get richer and the poor stay poor. Take a permanent break from Florr and do something more useful like HORNEX!!!!! * '''Author:''' HCaterpillar === '''op build''' === '''''"its op"''''' * '''Petals Used:''' Antennae, Fangs, Wing, Fangs, Wing, Fangs, Wing, Fangs, Wing, Magnet (you need 1 u fangs/ 1 u wing) *'''How it Works:''' Wing deals damage while Fangs heals. *'''Strengths:''' Everything. *'''Weaknesses:''' Nothing. *'''Variations:''' Replace antennae with a petal that is required to farm in special zones(starfish zone-dandelion) *'''Tip:''' This doesn't make you invincible, you still have to think. *'''Author:''' cool17 *'''Note:''' This is a lategame build. so use it only if you have some ultras/supers. ==='''Peashooter''' === '''''"Force-feed peas to your enemies!"''''' * '''Petals Used:''' Peas. all peas. preferably U+. *'''How it Works:''' Shoots peas. You can also use it as a normal petal *'''Strengths:''' Projectiles. *'''Weaknesses:''' Needs to be close. *'''Variations: None''' *'''Tip:''' get some caterpillars <- aww cute (HCaterpillar) *'''Author:''' in arras.io *'''Note:''' if you haven't noticed, this is a pvp build. ==='''Slow''' === '''''"Sit still or else..........."''''' * '''Petals Used:''' Antennae Sand Pincer Sand Pincer Faster Pincer Faster * '''Secondary Build:''' Rose Light Light Light Bubble Bubble Bubble Bubble Bubble * '''How it Works:''' slow enemies while dealing damage * '''Strengths:''' mobs that do only '''''BODY DAMAGE''''' * '''Weaknesses:''' ranged mobs(you have to get really close) * '''Variations:''' use iris instead of pincer * '''Tip:''' (optional) * '''Author:''' never telling you === '''PINBALL''' === '''''"EZ CLAPPED"''''' * '''Petals Used:''' bubble, yin yang, rubber, poo, cotton/cactus, clover * '''How it Works:''' This build is mostly for smurfing other players by ramming high rarity mobs into them. The rubber and poo helps the mob target the intended player, the yin yang is for aiming and the cactus is for staying alive * '''Variations:''' You could add ankh so you instantly disappear when you hit the mob. === '''A Little Bit Of Everything''' === '''''"pretty good."''''' * '''Petals Used:''' Antennae,Wing,Bone,Rock,Pincer,Claw,Iris,Salt,Rose,Magnet. * '''How it Works:''' Antennae make you see further. Wing makes good ranged damage. Bone is good for termites Pincer helps you slow down mobs. Claw allows for good damage for high health mobs. Salt deals good passive damage Rose heals you.Magnet picks items up. * '''Strengths:''' Easily destroys most creatures, works well for few mobs at a time. * '''Weaknesses:''' Many mobs and ultra/super mobs. * '''Variations:''' Replace Antennae or Salt for Third eye or Relic. === '''Drops Aplenty''' === '''''"I hate getting everything."''''' * '''Petals Used:''' U+ Wing, U+ Leaf, U+ Cactus, 6x U+ Wing (Super recommended), and Magnet. * '''How it Works:''' The Cactus will grant you extra health while the Leaf heals you, and the Wings will just damage anything nearby, making this an extremely efficient build for players attempting to get high rarity petals. * '''Strengths:''' Easily destroys most creatures, works well for [[Ultra Mobs|Ultras]] and [[Cockroach|Roaches.]] * '''Weaknesses:''' If something gets through your Wings, and you don't go into the defensive position, your death is quite likely. Also not very helpful for [[Wasp|Wasps]] and [[Hornet|Hornets]]. * '''Variations:''' In place of Magnet, use another Wing. * '''Author:''' Kitten With Headset === '''Second Layer''' === '''''"no hornets allowed"''''' *'''Petals Used:''' 2X U+ Yin-Yang, 8X M+ Salt *'''How it Works:''' Having two Yin-Yangs will provide a second layer of defense to your salts. This way, instead of the usual 1 salt getting hit by a hornet missile, 3 of them will get hit. Therefore, the hornet will take more damage. * '''Strengths:''' Projectile enemies. *'''Weaknesses:''' Rammers that are faster than you. * '''Variations:''' Adding a magnet or a healing is optional, but will drastically reduce the effect of the salts. *'''Tip:''' Do not use for Ultra+ mobs. *'''Author:''' nope === '''URANIUM!!!!''' === '''''"Poison me"''''' *'''Petals Used:''' M+ Cutter (optional), Uranium, Uranium, E+ Rose, E+ Rose, E+ Rose, E+ Dahlia, E+ Dahlia, E+ Dahlia, E+ Dahlia. *'''How it Works:''' Basically cutter is only useful at mythic+ rarities, uranium helps poison while your healing petals heal *'''Strengths:''' Many things that are not faster than you or range mobs. *'''Weaknesses:''' If you are targeted by range mobs, you ''might'' not survive unless you know how to dodge. *'''Variations:''' If you have a lower amount of petals, like 5, get rid of one uranium, a rose, and dahlias. Compatible with Neggromancers (egg users) as well, just 5 of the same type. * '''Strengths:''' Considering you can switch between your primary and secondary pretty quickly, using the right petals in the right situations (e.g a Fangs as the Primary petal against Leeches or Wings and Pincers as Primaries for flies and cockroaches) will work. Make sure to have something underneath the sponge so you can swap it, possibly cotton. * '''How it Works:''' Make sure to get the Second Life talent (preferably both of them) and Sharp Edges talent (best if maxed out, but depends on your level). After that get Medic, Health, and Reload. And of course Loadout. To use the build, ram into a mob. If you use yucca, make sure to stay in defensive mode. When you hit the mob, you will deal lots of damage, and outheal the damage taken thanks to the sponge and healing. The disc heavily reduces the damage you take, cutter lets you deal more damage, and sponge spreads the damage over time. Eventually though, the sponge has so much damage stacked on it you can’t outheal it anymore. When this happens, right before you die, swap the sponge. Your second life will let you revive and swapping the sponge gets rid of the damage stored. Make sure not to die again while swapping the sponge and while on the second life timer. * '''Strengths:''' Most mobs at your level. * '''Weaknesses:''' Spider, as sponge can’t slow down poison damage. Use petals specific to certain areas like dandelion for ocean or plank for jungle. * '''Tip:''' Don't go into the corner * '''Author:''' skyibex === '''SHOVEL OP''' === '''''"HIDE IN DIRT"''''' * '''Petals Used:''' Shovel (high rarity so u can use it a lot), iris(preferably, but other poison petals works), 3x bone(or any other high dps petal), healing petal/shell, iris(preferably,but other poison petals works), 3x bone(or any other high burst petal) * '''How it Works:''' poison the mob and use shovel, so they run * '''Strengths:''' high speed mobs * '''Weaknesses:''' Long range mobs * '''Tip:''' Get reach skill * '''Tip 2:''' DONT USE URANIUM I SWEAR TO GOD * '''Tip 3:''' just shovel before the mob rams u... works on roaches if you have some jellies/heavy/corn instead of 2 bones, etc. * '''Tip 4: ALSO DONT USE STINGER''' * '''Author:''' '''BADATGAME(Florr.io)''' === The Tringer === "the honk goes bonk" * '''Petals used''': 9 M+ Triangles, 1 M+ stinger * '''How it works:''' Triangles can stack with each other and they can deal continuous damage with low reload time. The stinger is for mowing down the HP of stronger enemies * '''Strengths:''' About every mob * '''Weaknesses:''' Long-range mobs (Hornet, Wasp) and faster mobs than usual (less of a weakness than the former type of mobs stated) * '''Tip:''' Don't use this in PVP and use the reload skill (try to max that out) * '''Author:''' Fire_St0rm or G1lly_Gonka === The Rice Lover === "'''''I love rice!!! Why don't you try it?"''''' * '''Petals Used:''' M+rice | M+rice | M+rice | Lights | 3 YYs. * '''How it works:''' This uses YY and Light to place the rice on top of each other, making this 3x better than the regular rice build. However, you need customisation with lights to align the rice together by using a combination of them that will make the 3 rices stack. OP damage, full ultra can easily loot super and carry. * '''Strengths:''' Mobs with big hitboxes in particular, but other mobs work as well. MASSIVE dps. * '''Weaknesses:''' Fast mobs or ranged mobs because you might not have time to allign the rice before you die. Also has a slightly harder time against Leafbugs due to the high armour nullifying the rice but still works. * '''Variations:''' Maybe replace a rice with bur * '''Tip:''' Get fast rotation and health * '''Author:''' CO0L_D (florr username) CO0L_D notavailable (fandom username) '''PLEASE DO NOT TAKE THIS BUILD AND SAY THAT IT'S YOURS BECAUSE IT REALLY IS A GREAT PIECE OF WORK. AN OP BUILD.''' === Triangle Mayhem === '''''"IM TRIANGLEING IT!!!"''''' * '''Petals Used:''' 9 M+ Triangle and 1 Faster * '''How it Works:''' Considering how triangle gets more damage with the more triangles used you're getting like bonkers level of dps and damage * '''Strengths:''' most mobs tbh * '''Weaknesses:''' maybe shooters? * '''Variations:''' 8 tri, 1 leaf and 1 faster or full tri if you have enough base petal rotation * '''Author:''' idk who invented it but Anguisher (florr username, me) put it here * === Uranium Madness === '''''"Uranium to you, no melting for me."''''' * '''Petals Used:''' Leaf, Uranium, Lotus, Lotus, Lotus, Lotus * '''How it Works: When you get close to enemies they get auto poisoned while you get no health taken even though you are melting''' * '''Strengths:''' Low hp, Low rarity, Not Projectile Launching mobs. * '''Weaknesses:''' very high hp, very high rarity, Projectile Launching mobs. * '''Variations: None''' * '''Tip:''' Be far and as they get close they take more dmg and die. * '''Author:''' maybe me or anyone else idk Damage to you ”sorry, but you’re evaded and dead” M+yuccax2/M+leafx2/M+corn/M+Stinger with duplicator/ M+Salt/ M+Iris/U+Coin/M+Talisman how it works : damage dealt whilst healing or evading strengths: hornets and so with low rarity. weakness: anythingcontaining high health. tip: change salt with wing to deal more damage to hornets. author: TunnersAGamer === '''Ram of Steel''' === '''''"Hard as steel, strong as crazy"''''' * '''L+ Sponge | M+ Basil | M+ Basil | M+ Basil | M+ Yucca | M+ Yucca | M+ Yucca | M+ Yucca | L+ Disc | M+ Relic''' * '''How it Works:''' It lets you ram while the sponge tanks the damage and the yucca heals so you don't lose hp * '''Strengths:''' Any mob that chase you or mobs that don't move at all * '''Weaknesses:''' Mobs that don't chase you and ultra+ mobs * '''Variations:''' Change disc with cutter if you prever more damage, or change relic with amulet * '''Tip:''' It gets stronger if you're cornered into a wall because you're colliding faster. This build lets you survive almost everything * '''Author:''' belllllugaga (florr username) === Poisonous Rampage === * '''Petals Used:''' 7x Iris, 2x Grapes, 1x Rose * '''How it Works:''' the iris deploys poison close range, and the grapes are for long range * '''Strengths:''' takes a LOT of damage * '''Weaknesses:''' requires good aim with the grapes and you will be obliged to go into jungle to get the grapes * '''Variations:''' if you want more mobility, replace irises with bubbles * '''Tip:''' idk * '''Author:''' some random guy === '''Missiles w/Supporting Petals''' === '''''"DIE, DIE, DIE, DIE, DIE, DIE, DIE, DIE, DIE, DIE, DIE, DIE, DIE!!"''''' * '''Petals Used:''' [[Sponge]], [[Leaf]], [[Faster]], [[Mysterious Powder]] (highest level possible), [[Antennae]], [[Missile]], Missile, Missile, Missile, Missile (any order, but ALL missiles MUST be next to each other) * '''How it Works:''' Antennae gives you a better view of enemies, so you can aim your missiles properly. Faster makes your missiles faster, so you can aim them at your enemies more quickly. Leaf heals you. What...what else would it do? Missiles can, of course, reach very far and deal a lot of damage. Missile homes into enemies more than you think it does. Mysterious powder keeps your enemies from catching up to you and possibly killing you. Sponge spreads out the damage you take over a period of time, allowing leaf to heal you more, possibly saving your life on one or more occasions. * '''Strengths:''' Again, missiles can, of course, reach very far and deal a lot of damage. The leaf and sponge combo, again, can possibly save your life on one or more occasions. * '''Weaknesses:''' Because the mysterious powder becomes ineffective when you're nearby enemies of a higher rarity, fast enemies can and will catch up to you, killing you, without the mysterious powder. It is important to increase its rarity to as high as you can increase it. It's also NOT good with crowd control, but can still do it. * '''Variations:''' The antennae can be replaced by a [[Third Eye|third eye]] if necessary, but will reduce your sight. The antennae can also be replaced by a [[Mecha Antennae|mecha antennae]] with the missiles being replaced by [[Mecha Missile|mecha missiles]]. If you do, though, the mecha antennae and the mecha missiles have to be the same rarity, or it won't work. You can swap out one of the petals with a [[Yin Yang|yin yang]] in a secondary slot for a brief moment if the missiles ever rotate past the enemy. '''DO NOT REPLACE THE MYSTERIOUS POWDER WITH A [[Bubble|BUBBLE]]!!''' Like I said earlier, fast enemies can and will catch up to you, killing you, without the mysterious powder. If a fast, dangerous enemy DOES begin chasing you, you'll either not be thinking in the moment to use the bubble or the enemy will have already caught up enough to be able to pop the bubble, keeping you from using it. You may also be able to replace one of the petals with a [[Lotus|lotus]]. Sponge does not affect poison damage, so the lotus is very useful. I personally prefer to use the lotus rather than the antennae. * '''Tip:''' Keep the weaknesses in mind. It'll save your life. * '''Author:''' [[User:GD MewPinkCat|A funky man]]. [[Category:Builds]]

title: Builds - Hel
content:
{{Background|图片=Helb.png|大小=2000px}}
*
{{Builds - Hel|Hel}}
__TOC__
== Builds-General ==

=== Somewhat Safe Bubble Build ===
'''''"Better than nothing!"'''''

* '''Petals Used:''' 1 U+ [[Jelly]], 1 [[Antennae]], 1 U+ [[Yucca]], 1 U+ [[Starfish]], 1 M+ [[Cotton]], 3 M+ Bubbles, 1 M+ [[Poo]], and another  U+ Starfish.
* '''How it Works:''' The Jelly keeps the mobs and [[Wasp/Hel|Hel Wasp]] missiles away, the Antennae and Bubbles are self-explanatory, and the healing petals and Cotton keep you alive.
* '''Strengths:''' This build will keep you alive a lot longer than regular bubble builds.
* '''Weaknesses:''' Useless offensively and you can die in seconds if not careful.
* '''Variations:''' Some variations of this build are:
** '''Mana User:''' Replace the Cotton with [[Cotton/Magic|Magic Cotton]] and equip a couple [[Mana Orb|Orbs]] or [[Leaf/Magic|Magic Leaves.]]
** '''Spongy:''' Replace the Cotton with a Sponge.
** Alternatively, switch out a Starfish for a [[Disc]] and switch between that and a [[Yin Yang]] while bubbling around.
* '''Tips:''' Stay away from Hel Wasps, they are annoying.
* '''Author:''' Saltpetal (Fandom), Sandstorm_XD (florr.io)

===Suicide===
'''''"Onwards to Hel I go!!!!!"'''''
*'''Petals Used:''' 10x R+ Uranium
*'''How it Works:''' Makes anyone under level 20 to die
*'''Strengths:''' Kills you (if you wanna go to Hel)
*'''Weaknesses:''' You might do this by accident (very rare)
*'''Variations:''' None
*'''Tip:''' '''''DO NOT USE HEALING PETALS!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!'''''

*'''Author:''' Eyellstaun
Battery Ram

"Zappy Zappy"

Petals Used: U+ soil, U+ Relic, M+ Disc, M+ Cutter, U+ Bandage, M+ Sponge, 4 U+ Battery, 5 M+ Batteries in this order:

Soil/Relic/Bandage/Sponge/Disc/Cutter/4 U+Battery and 5 M+ Battery under soil, relic, sponge, disc and cutter

How It Works: ram into enemies, when second chance (or bandage) activates, press "R" to switch to full battery. Max out Loadout, Reload, Health, and Sharp Edges

Weaknesses: Hell Wasps, Hell Supers, U+ Hell Beetles above 60% hp, Looting Gamblers, being slow (due to soil)

Strengths: Lower health ultra hell enemies, PVP, hordes of mythics, Dandylion (because no healing)

Variations: swap out soil and relic for healing petals
*'''Author:'''Eeveeforest1 (original build by Floral)
=== RIGHT AHEAD OF YA! ===
”Wings!WOOOOOO”

Petals used:At least 3M+Wings,1M pincer,1M powder,1 M healing

How it works:You run with the powder boost,you wings are ranged and the pincer slows down beetles that get way too close for a hug.

Strengths:Beetles below L rarity

Weaknesses:ANYTHING THAT’S NOT A L-BEETLE

Author:CrystalKai12345

[[Hel Beetle|Hel Beetles]] have high speed, attack, and HP. One should try to use [[Mysterious Powder]] or [[Pincer]] with minimum {{Rarity|Mythic}} rarity to survive a long time. Beware of running into swarms of [[Hel Beetle]] as they can easily overwhelm and kill a flower in numbers. It is advised to try to quickly kill off any of the pursuing [[Hel Beetle]] quickly, as they are faster than a flower with normal speed and cannot be slowed down if too many [[Hel Beetle|Hel Beetles]] are pushing them forward.

Global [[PvP]] is on, so beware of other players, although the vast majority can't get into an actual fight without dying to {{Rarity|Legendary}} [[Hel Beetle|Hel Beetles]] or other players. Only strong players with {{Rarity|Ultra}} petals, or skilled players with {{Rarity|Mythic}} and {{Rarity|Legendary}} petals can survive for long here.

One should also combine knockback petals with damage petals, since you can keep beetles away while also killing them.

Also, players are advised to bring some bubbles as it is very hard to collect the drops at normal player speed. (Due to PVP being turned on, Magnet doesn't work in Hel.)

{{Builds - Hel}}

== Builds-PvE ==

=== Die ===

* Petals used: yinyang/ healing petal/ sponge/ bubble(L+)/ bubble(L+)/ Bubble(L+ or a healing petal)/healing petal / damage petal(preferably burst damage)/  wing / damage petal(preferably burst damage)
* How it works: kills most low-leveled mobs with burst dmg petals, doges wasp's missles and runs away with bubble, wing for a shield 
* Strengths: wasp and beetle
* Weaknesses: u can loot most higher leveled mobs with this one, switch this with a dps build with 2+ pincers(hell spiders need 2 pincers to slow)
* Author: [https://www.youtube.com/@N1BobYT N1BobYT]

*

===Mid build for mid players (Adapted from an earlier version of mine; image to the right)===
[[File:Old Hel Build (before I had more of the ultras listed below).png|alt=Old version of this build|thumb|268x268px|An older version of this build, before it was perfected and more of the petals listed below were obtained. ]]

* '''Petals Used:''' 

2x [[Lightning|Mythic+ Lightning]]

2x [[Missile|Ultra+ Missile]] (Any Mythic+ high damage petal will do, but [[Missile]] is best; viable replacements are [[Rock|Mythic+ Rocks]], [[Stinger|Mythic+ Stingers]], [[Peas|Ultra+ Peas]], and [[Pearl|Ultra+ Pearls]])

1x [[Pincer|Mythic+ Pincer]]

1x [[Web|Ultra+ Web]]

2x [[Yucca|Mythic+ Yucca]]

1x [[Antennae|Mythic+ Antennae]]

1x [[Third Eye]], if available (not recommended as explained in the following section). If not, then any extra petal to suit your playing style will do. (Powder, Jelly, or Rubber for players bad at outrunning Hel Beetles, Basil or heals for more heal when low, Cactus for more health for players below Level 140, Salt or Battery for more ram damage, etc.)
*'''How it Works:''' The Missiles or otherwise high-damage petals will deal lots of damage, all the while the Lightnings, Web, and Pincer, combined with players circling the beetle while attacking (due to the Hel Beetle's low angular velocity and acceleration), will massively slow it down to a near-standstill. The Third Eye provides increased range, but might cause the missiles and web to launch before intended. A [[Battery|Mythic+ Battery]] or a [[Iris|Mythic+ Iris]] is a great replacement. Yuccas as healing petals are preferred as they have more heal and the player will be in the defensive position most of the time anyways.

*'''Strengths:''' Common to Legendary Hel Beetles can be killed with ease. Swarms of Mythic Hel Beetles will take longer, but as long as they are adequately slowed down with Lightning, Web, and Pincer, they shouldn't pose a huge threat. You can survive 2-3 rams from a Mythic Hel Beetle depending on the variations to the build listed above.
* '''Weaknesses:''' Sweaty pros, The Ultra+ Hel Beetle, and players with untreatable skill issues (if the skill issue were that bad, how did you even get these petals?). Other players with Third Eye would be a problem if you don't have it yet.

*'''Variations:''' Please read the first bullet point.

===== '''Tip:''' This build is generally good for mid level players with a few decent ultras and >20k base health (max base health at Level 150 is ideal). =====
__TOC__

=== Silent Striker ===
"free points"

* '''Petals used:''' Bubble (Mythic+), Sponge (Mythic+), Lightning (Ultra+) x5, Antennae (Ultra+), Cotton (Mythic+), Fang or Starfish (Mythic+), put Yin Yang and an extra Cotton under Lightning, put an extra Bubble below Cotton
* '''How it works:''' Lightning can efficiently deal with large swarms of Hel mobs and allow you to hit Hel Wasps without going near them. However, the main use of this build is killing other players. When you see an Ultra Hel Beetle that is aggroed on someone else, hit the beetle with your lightning and it will damage the player. Another perk of lightning is that it will reset enemies' velocity, which means that they are almost guaranteed to die, either to your lightning or to the beetle that is chasing them.
* '''Strengths:''' Swarms of mythic- hel mobs, killing other players, gaining score quickly
* '''Weaknesses:''' Does not do well in direct pvp, people might get mad at you and target you
* '''Variations:''' Replace some lightning with burst damage petals to increase PVP capabilities
* '''Author:''' yenolard

=== '''Speed''' ===
"I am speed"

* '''Petals used:''' Coin (Mythic+), Dice (Mythic+), Faster (Mythic+), Faster (Mythic+), Iris (Mythic+), Faster (Mythic+), Rubber/Pincer(Mythic+), Chip(Ultra+), Rose/Yucca/Dahlia/Basil(Mythic+)x2, switch out fasters or healing with Antennae and Magnet
* '''How it works:''' Set Luck talent to max to assist Dice. Coin, dice, Iris, Chip, and Fasters deal DPS while Rubber/Pincer saves you from beetles multihiting you.
* '''Strengths:''' Mythic - Beetles, spiders, Wasps, killing other players, and Centipedes if used carefully.
* '''Weaknesses:''' Centipedes if not used carefully.
* '''Variations:''' Lightning and Battery against summons and Centipedes. Take note that batteries do not take damage from mobs, so a DPS build with them would suck.
* '''Author:''' PYEO

==='''Indestructible'''===
'''''"I refuse to take damage."'''''
*'''Petals Used:''' M+ Poo/ L+ sponge/ Shovel/ M+ Light/ 2x L+ Cotton/ M+ Light/ 2x L+ Dahlia/ M+ Light
*'''How it Works:''' Poo decreases mob aggro range, Sponge speards damage over a period of time, Shovel de-aggroes, the Lights separate petals into 3 groups and atttacks mobs, Cotton absorbs damage and finaly Dahlia is for healing.
*'''Strengths:''' Medium Mobs and L+ Wasp missiles
*'''Weaknesses:''' Strong Mobs and extreme amounts of taken damage.
*'''Variations:''' Swap Shovel for eggs, relic or cactus
*'''Tip:''' Steer clear of Ultra mobs
*'''Author:''' Petalyte
*
==='''The hel Gambler'''===
'''''"Gambler: Who are you , Me: I am you But better"'''''
*'''Petals Used:''' third eye , sponge , card , 2 dices , poker chip , 2 dices , card , clover (ALL M+)
*'''How it Works:''' Third eye for range sponge so u dont die card and chip and dice so you look like a gambler so is clover
*'''Strengths:''' Mobs same rarity or lower than your petals
*'''Weaknesses:''' Mobs higher rarity than your petals
*'''Variations:''' Healing build below the build and add antennae below third eye
*'''Tip:''' IDK bring high rarity petals so it works on high rarity mobs
*'''Author:''' AbsolPlayz

=== '''Looter''' ===
"Loots ultras with ease"

* '''Petals Used:''' 3x M+ Bubble,  1x U+ Cotton, 2x U+ Chip, 1x M+ Sponge, 2x U+ Starfish, 1x C+ YinYang
* '''How it Works:''' Bubble makes sure you can catch up to any ultras, and able to run away from them. The cotton tanks the sponge damage, and the starfish are for heals.
* '''Strengths:''' Just about any hel ultra except for wasp
* '''Variations:''' Magnet or another cotton below the YinYang
* '''Weaknesses:''' This build is highly demanding, requiring some rare petals and needing a bit of skill.
==='''Hold the line'''===
'''''"All won't matter if you dies."'''''
*'''Petals Used:''' Ul+ Pincer, 4x Ul+ Egg(2Ant+2Beetle+Duplicator suggested), M+ Antennae(Switch to Third Eye when fighting), healing, other petals(e.g. more eggs or healing petals)     Note: Ul+ Pincer gets augmented in 25/1/9 update.
*'''How it Works:''' Augmented Ul Pincer can stop a Mythic mob or slow down an Ultra mob quite a lot. Eggs can tank and hold the mobs back, which gives the player plenty time to decide whether to fight or to run. Antennae allows the player to sense Ul wasp farther away. With this build, players can ensure their survival except for extreme conditions.
* '''Strengths:''' Every mob in hel when it is alone. Not very useful against Ul Wasps.
*'''Weaknesses:''' a bunch of mobs or other players
*'''Variations:''' All Eggs for burst damage and Ul+ Poo. Poo won't work if you have summoned friendly mobs near you.
*'''Tip:''' Don't ram. If things get out of control, use bubbles to run away.

=== '''Build for fast Hel mobs''' ===
'''''"This one requires a shovel"'''''
* '''Petals Used:''' 1 Pincer 4 anything 1 Pincer 3 anything 1 shovel
*'''How it Works:''' Pincer slow down mobs and anything destroys mobs. Use Shovel when you are targeted by Hel Wasps or too many Hel Beetles so they will target on someone else.
*'''Strengths:''' Hel Spider, Hel Centipede
*'''Weaknesses:''' Mobs with much higher rarities than your pincer and Hel Wasp.
*'''Tip:''' Get reach and reload talent
* '''Tip 2:''' magnet is useful but not reqired
* '''Tip 3:''' use the shovel when you see players or gamblers around.
*'''Author:''' 6

== Builds-PvP ==

=== Nuke ===
"A build that will kill players in a instant"

* Petals used: Faster(Optional), Basil(M+), Bubble(L+), Leaf(U+), Pincer(M+), Sand(M+), Jelly(M+), Stinger(M+), Leaf(U+), Jelly(M+). Note: This build is recommended with the rarities listed above but any rarity above epic or legendary will do for newcomers,
* How it works: The Bubble will propel you away from the Hel Beetles, Hel Wasps and the Basil and Leaf will heal you quickly as well as deal damage. Pincer will slow down enemy's and Hel Beetles and Hel Spiders and the Jelly will knock back other players in PvP and it will help against Hel Centipedes a a bit! The Stinger can also "NUKE"  players that have Ultra Petals
* Strengths: Every Hel Mob and Most players with Mythic Petals.
* Weaknesses: Hel Centipede, it can kill the player easily since Hel Centipede has seperate parts leaving the Pincer useless and well as the Jelly. The Stinger can only damage one part of the Centipede making it even more useless.
* Variations: You could have the Leafs replaced with all Sand although I recommend to have another load out with roses or yuccas with 2 to 4 basils!
* TIps: Never go against players with Super Petals and Lightnings since if they attack a mob the lightning can chain onto you.
* Author: In game name: awfr

=== DIE PLEASE ===
'''"I now have 80 mbasic after 12 hours of farming!"'''

* '''petals used:''' 2 Mrose (spread them out throughout the build) 3 M+ blood stinger 1 L+ dandelion (any rarity works but preferred is mythic) 1 Ultra iris, 1 ultra faster, 1 m+ stinger
* '''How it work:''' make life hell for anyone who fights you. dandelion stops them from healing, poison makes them take damage, their sponge cannot save them and neither can their healing.
* '''strength:''' decimating players and hel mobs that are not of the ultra or super rarity. Is very good against sponge users
* '''weaknesses:''' swarms of hel mobs, hel mobs above mythic rarity, deathwheel builds can shred the stingers, and also especially hel wasps
* '''variation:''' replace iris with ultra pincer. is recommended for farming beetles, and pincer can stop players from moving further allowing you to destroy them
* '''tips:''' have mythic+ on both reload and petal rotation in talents if you want the full effect of this build
* author: Cookiesarecool1917

=== savior without ygg ===

: ''"mmm,no ygg no ygggggggggggggggggggggggggggggggggggggggggg!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!"''

* '''Petals Used:''' only mark
* '''How it Works:''' mark can send players to hel again mean revived
* '''Strengths:''' they will show mercy on u
* '''Weaknesses:''' only 1% chance as its pvp.
* '''Author:''' rsmeowboyz
{{Builds2}}
[[Category:Builds]]

title: Builds - Jungle
content:
{{Builds - Scenario|Jungle}}
Due to the  separate release times, this Page is split into two parts, builds for dealing with Termites and build for the rest of the Jungle. Note that the first 2-3 Jungle builds were made before the Jungle biome was released.
{{Background|图片=Jungleb.png|大小=2000px}}
__TOC__

==Termite Builds==

=== Anti-Overmind===
'''''"Never touch overminds!"'''''
*'''Petals Used:''' Third Eye, Wing, Stinger, Stinger, Faster, Faster, Wing, Wing, Plank, Magnet
*'''How it Works:''' Mad range, it kills overminds quickly.
*'''Strengths:''' Ultra overminds or Super overminds.
*'''Weaknesses:''' Any mythic termites that are chasing you,
*'''Variations:''' You can also use healing petals.
*'''Tip:''' If you have ultra petals. then it's a best way.
*'''Author:''' Slime Adventure

===Egg Hell===
'''''"When in doubt, use your eggs"'''''

*'''Petals Used:''' Beetle Egg, Beetle Egg, Beetle Egg, Beetle Egg, Beetle Egg, Beetle Egg, Beetle Egg, Beetle Egg, Beetle Egg, Beetle Egg,
*'''How it Works:''' Let the beetles do it for you. Don't worry about lagging other people since the Termite Overmind place isn't usually crowded.
*'''Strengths:''' Dealing Quick Damage to the Termite Overmind and protecting yourself from mythic soldier termites which spawn out of practically nowhere. You can stay a good distance away while still dealing heavy damage.
*'''Weaknesses:''' Weak if you have high respawn time eggs.
*'''Variations:''' Ant eggs, since they are more consistent with their damage.
*'''Tip:''' Don't use this build if there are lots of people.
*'''Author:'''

=== Hellsaw===
'''''"See ya in hell!"'''''
*'''Petals Used: Rubber, Light (Legendary+), Faster, Jelly.'''
*'''How it Works:''' Rubber and Jelly to yeetus, light and faster to damagus.
*'''Strengths:''' Nothing
*'''Weaknesses: <u>''Everything.''</u>'''
*'''Variations:''' NONE
*'''Tip:''' Don't use this build.
*'''Author: DumGamer69420nice (Florr.io User)'''

=== '''Skeletal System''' ===
''"Enough bones to re-create a spare skeleton"''

* '''Petals Used:''' Bones x 9, Magnet
* '''How it Works:''' Bones won't take damage from ants, so it will deal a TON of damage. If there is a crowd, the termites will spread the damage, so you can kill them all at once. magnet collects drops
* '''Strengths:''' termites below your bone rarity, normal ants below your bone rarity
* '''Weaknesses:''' mobs with moderately high body damage (they will overpower the bone armor and destroy them)
* '''Variations:''' If you are skilled with yin yang, use a couple of lights and switch the yin yang interchangeably to group the bones in front of the ant, increasing the dps by a lot
* '''Tip:''' DO NOT ATTACK ANTS THAT ARE THE SAME OR HIGHER RARITY AS YOUR BONES.(the bones will succumb to the ants' higher body dmg) When facing ants of same/above rarity, use a regular dps build.
* '''Author:''' a polygon (a.k.a. APrettyFlower)

=== Cocktail ===

* '''Petals Used:''' Bone ×1~3, Stinger, Egg, Lightning, Fangs
* '''Weakness''': high rarity mobs
* '''Variation''': triangle, bubble

== Jungle Builds==

===Cotton Grinder===
'''''"Killing an unreleased mob :D"'''''
*'''Petals Used:''' 1, 2 or 3 fasters depending on your reload and all lights.
* '''How it Works:''' It swiftly shreds any shrub
*'''Strengths:''' Shrubs
*'''Weaknesses:''' Possibly Dragonflies and termites.
*'''Variations:''' Replace the least useful light you  have with a magnet. You can also add some rice for quick damage.
* '''Tip: When the jungle update comes out, please test this build and change the petals if nessecary.'''
*'''Author:''' SubscribeToHysleria
*Message from TwilightMoon to SubscribeToHysleria:  Nice build, fam! But I recommend you use tringers/pringers instead of lights.
* Message from SubscribeToHysleria to TwilightMoon: Tringers / Pringers or Pentingers have slow cooldown so it isnt a "chainsaw"

==='''Kill the dragonfly'''===
'''''"Killing a fly makes time fly"'''''

'''Petals Used:''' (Powder, yucca, 7x jelly, stinger)
*'''How it Works:''' Powder lets you run away, yucca tanks hits, jelly keeps it away while stinger spawns
*'''Strengths:''' dragonflies, termites
*'''Weaknesses:''' long ranged attackers
*'''Variations:''' replace yucca with leaf or rose, replace jellies with heavy
*'''Tip:''' Do not use this build if you are epic or under as epic jelly has bad knockback.
*'''Author:''' Kohsa, guest in game

===  '''Anti-Armor''' ===
''"Tanks will become non-existant"''

* '''Petals Used:''' Iris x 5, Lightning x 5
* '''Secondary Petals:''' Wing x 5, Antennae, Faster, Leaf x 3
* '''How it Works:''' Iris and lightning excel at damaging leafbugs, since they bypass the annoying armor properties. When fighting a leafbug, If you meet other mobs, switch to the second build to shred them quickly and switch back to continue fighting the leafbug.
* '''Strengths:''' Leafbugs, ul and super leafbugs, bushes, perhaps dark ladybugs and evil centipedes and hordes of enemies
* '''Weaknesses:''' wasps, mantises, termites (in this case switch to second build)
* '''Tips:''' Leafbug's hitbox is actually smaller than its appearance, so when fighting the leafbug, notice where your petals get destroyed by leafbug body damage. This way you can estimate its hitbox and avoid being too far away to damage it or being too close and getting damaged. When fighting ul+ leafbug, make sure to clear the area of '''all shooting mobs'''. Even an epic wasp missile will have enough knockback to push you into the ul leafbug, making you die or take a lot of damage. Usually, if you have good enough build, you can take on mythic and below rarity leafbugs without much trouble
* '''Variations:''' Third eye is recommended. This way you can attack the leafbug without much risks of accidentally touching it and wasps/mantis have a lower chance of knocking you into the leafbug. Magnet is recomended if you want to collect drops. You can add/remove iris/lightning according to what you have. If you don't have good irises, you can use grapes or pincers (just note pincers wont slow down ul+ leafbug). if you don't have any good poison petals or lightning, try using stinger to see if you can overcome the armor
* '''Author:''' a polygon (a.k.a. APrettyFlower)
